socialClasses.en: Social classes included political elites, upper and middle business and professional groups, government employees, urban workers, petty traders, a vast rural peasantry, landless laborers, and constitutionally protected Scheduled Caste and Scheduled Tribe communities. Although caste discrimination was legally restricted, caste continued to shape marriage, social networks, and local politics.

allies.zh: 印度在2000年并无正式军事同盟体系，但与俄罗斯保持传统战略合作，与不丹关系密切，并与孟加拉国、斯里兰卡、尼泊尔、东盟国家、欧盟、美国及日本发展多层次外交与经贸联系。
allies.en: In 2000 India did not belong to a formal military alliance system, but it maintained a traditional strategic partnership with Russia, close ties with Bhutan, and multi-layered diplomatic and commercial relations with Bangladesh, Sri Lanka, Nepal, ASEAN states, the European Union, the United States, and Japan.

enemies.zh: 巴基斯坦是最主要的对手；与中国虽在改善关系，但仍存在战略猜疑与边界争议。印度同时警惕跨境恐怖主义和周边地区的不稳定局势。
enemies.en: Pakistan was the principal adversary; relations with China were improving but still marked by strategic suspicion and unresolved border disputes. India also remained wary of cross-border terrorism and instability in surrounding regions.

foreignPolicy.zh: 外交政策强调战略自主、地区主导地位、发展中国家合作、与主要大国平衡交往以及维护印度洋利益。核试验后，印度努力在承受国际压力的同时争取被承认为重要大国。
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign policy emphasized strategic autonomy, regional primacy, cooperation with the developing world, balanced engagement with major powers, and protection of Indian Ocean interests. After its nuclear tests, India sought recognition as a major power while managing international pressure.

keyInnovations.zh: 印度在2000年前后具有卫星发射与遥感能力、核技术、弹道导弹计划、制药与仿制药生产、绿色革命农业技术以及快速崛起的软件开发和IT服务产业。班加罗尔、海得拉巴和浦那等城市成为科技与外包中心。
keyInnovations.en: Around 2000 India possessed satellite launch and remote sensing capabilities, nuclear technology, ballistic missile programs, pharmaceutical and generic drug production, Green Revolution agricultural techniques, and a rapidly rising software development and IT services sector. Cities such as Bengaluru, Hyderabad, and Pune were becoming major technology and outsourcing hubs.

strengths.zh: 印度的主要优势在于庞大人口与市场、成熟的选举民主制度、强韧的宪法秩序、英语和技术人才储备、农业基础广阔以及不断扩大的服务业和软件出口。
strengths.en: India's chief strengths lay in its vast population and market, established electoral democracy, resilient constitutional order, English-speaking technical talent, broad agricultural base, and expanding service and software exports.

weaknesses.zh: 主要弱点包括人均收入偏低、贫困与文盲问题、基础设施不足、财政赤字与债务负担、官僚效率不均、城乡与地区发展差距，以及宗教、种姓和族群紧张关系。
weaknesses.en: Its main weaknesses included low per capita income, poverty and illiteracy, inadequate infrastructure, fiscal deficits and debt burdens, uneven bureaucratic efficiency, rural-urban and regional disparities, and religious, caste, and ethnic tensions.

outlook.zh: 总体前景积极。若能继续推进经济改革、改善电力与交通基础设施、扩大教育和公共卫生覆盖并控制地区冲突，印度有望在21世纪初成长为亚洲和全球的重要经济与战略力量。
outlook.en: The overall outlook was positive. If India continued economic reform, improved power and transport infrastructure, expanded education and public health, and contained regional conflicts, it was well positioned to emerge in the early 21st century as a major Asian and global economic and strategic power.

description.zh: 南亚最大民主联邦，信息技术产业与多党议会政治并行发展。
description.en: South Asia's largest democracy, combining federal parliamentary politics with a rapidly growing IT sector.

leader.zh: 阿塔尔·比哈里·瓦杰帕伊

ideology.zh: 印度教民族主义、经济自由化、强硬国防、核威慑
ideology.en: Hindu nationalism, economic liberalization, strong defense, nuclear deterrence

relationship.zh: 印度人民党自1998年起领导全国民主联盟（NDA）执政联合政府，瓦杰帕伊担任总理。该党通过与地方党派结盟获得议会多数，但执政联盟内部派系众多，需要不断平衡各方利益。与最大反对党国大党的竞争构成印度政治的主轴。
relationship.en: The BJP led the National Democratic Alliance (NDA) coalition government from 1998, with Vajpayee as Prime Minister. It secured a parliamentary majority through alliances with regional parties, though the coalition required constant internal balancing. Competition with the Congress party formed the main axis of Indian politics.

description.zh: 印度人民党成立于1980年，源自印度教民族主义运动传统和前人民同盟。1998年瓦杰帕伊领导NDA联盟上台执政，同年5月印度进行了震惊世界的波卡兰核试验，宣告印度为有核国家。瓦杰帕伊执政时期推行经济自由化改革、基础设施建设和信息技术产业发展，同时在克什米尔问题和对巴关系上采取强硬路线。2000年时BJP正处于执政巅峰期，但其印度教民族主义意识形态——特别是与国民志愿服务团（RSS）的联系——引发了世俗主义者和少数族群的持续担忧。
description.en: The BJP was founded in 1980, rooted in the Hindu nationalist tradition and the former Bharatiya Jana Sangh. In 1998, Vajpayee led the NDA coalition to power, and in May that year India conducted the Pokhran nuclear tests that stunned the world, declaring India a nuclear-weapon state. The Vajpayee government pursued economic liberalization, infrastructure development, and IT industry growth while taking a hard line on Kashmir and relations with Pakistan. By 2000 the BJP was at the peak of its governing power, though its Hindu nationalist ideology—particularly ties to the RSS—continued to raise concerns among secularists and minorities.

name.zh: 阿塔尔·比哈里·瓦杰帕伊

role.zh: NDA联盟领导人，温和派印度教民族主义者
role.en: NDA coalition leader, moderate Hindu nationalist

name.zh: 拉尔·克里希纳·阿德瓦尼

role.zh: BJP核心强硬派领袖，阿约提亚运动推动者
role.en: Core BJP hardliner, driving force behind the Ayodhya movement

role.zh: 瓦杰帕伊核心外交智囊
role.en: Key foreign policy adviser to Vajpayee

ideology.zh: 世俗主义、社会福利、尼赫鲁-甘地家族传统、混合经济
ideology.en: Secularism, social welfare, Nehru-Gandhi dynasty tradition, mixed economy

relationship.zh: 国大党是印度最古老的政治组织，独立后长期执政，但在1990年代失去主导地位。2000年时以索尼娅·甘地为党首的国大党是人民院中最大的反对力量，试图重建联盟基础以挑战BJP主导的NDA政府。该党与BJP在世俗主义与印度教民族主义的根本分歧上展开激烈竞争。
relationship.en: The Congress party was India's oldest political organization, having dominated government for decades after independence before losing its primacy in the 1990s. In 2000, under Sonia Gandhi's leadership, Congress was the main opposition in the Lok Sabha, seeking to rebuild its coalition base to challenge the BJP-led NDA government. The party competed with the BJP along the fundamental divide between secularism and Hindu nationalism.

description.zh: 印度国民大会党成立于1885年，是印度独立运动的核心力量，从尼赫鲁到英迪拉·甘地到拉吉夫·甘地，甘地-尼赫鲁家族长期主导党的方向。1991年拉吉夫·甘地遇刺后，国大党历经动荡。1998年意大利裔的索尼娅·甘地接任党主席，面临关于其外国出身的激烈争议。国大党传统上主张世俗国家、社会正义、保护少数族群权利和混合经济路线，在南印度和城市穆斯林群体中保有较强基础。2000年时该党正处于重建期，为日后2004年的意外胜选蓄力。
description.en: The Indian National Congress was founded in 1885 and was the central force of the independence movement. The Nehru-Gandhi dynasty—from Nehru to Indira Gandhi to Rajiv Gandhi—long dominated the party's direction. After Rajiv Gandhi's assassination in 1991, Congress experienced turbulence. In 1998, Italian-born Sonia Gandhi assumed the party presidency amid fierce controversy over her foreign origin. Congress traditionally championed a secular state, social justice, minority rights protection, and a mixed economy, retaining strong support in South India and among urban Muslim communities. In 2000 the party was in a rebuilding phase, laying groundwork for its surprise victory in 2004.

role.zh: 尼赫鲁-甘地家族继承人，党的核心领导者
role.en: Nehru-Gandhi dynasty heir, core party leader

role.zh: 1991年经济改革设计师，党内经济智囊
role.en: Architect of the 1991 economic reforms, party economic brain trust

role.zh: 国大党元老，外交与财政领域资深政治家
role.en: Congress veteran, senior statesman in foreign affairs and finance

name.zh: 印度共产党（马克思主义）及左翼阵线
name.en: Communist Party of India (Marxist) & Left Front

ideology.zh: 马克思主义、土地改革、劳工权益、反帝反全球化
ideology.en: Marxism, land reform, labor rights, anti-imperialism, anti-globalization

relationship.zh: 印共（马）领导的左翼阵线是印度政坛第三大政治势力，在西孟加拉邦和喀拉拉邦长期执政。在联邦层面，左翼阵线作为反对党，在关键时刻对国大党和BJP两大政党都保持批判性距离，有时通过外部支持参与全国政治博弈。
relationship.en: The CPI(M)-led Left Front was the third-largest political force in Indian politics, governing West Bengal and Kerala for extended periods. At the federal level, the Left Front maintained critical distance from both Congress and BJP, sometimes participating in national political bargaining through external support arrangements.

description.zh: 印度共产党（马克思主义）成立于1964年，由印度共产党分裂而来，主张以马克思列宁主义指导印度革命。该党在西孟加拉邦建立了世界上持续时间最长的民选共产主义政府（1977-2011年），推行土地改革和地方民主。在喀拉拉邦，左翼民主阵线也反复赢得邦选举。苏尔吉特时代的印共（马）反对经济全球化和私有化政策，主张保护劳工权益和农民利益。2000年时左翼阵线在全国人民院中占有约40席，是平衡全国政治格局的重要力量，但其选民基础主要集中在少数几个邦。
description.en: The CPI(M) was founded in 1964 from a split in the Communist Party of India, advocating Marxist-Leninist guidance for Indian revolution. In West Bengal, the party established the world's longest-running elected communist government (1977-2011), implementing land reform and local democracy. In Kerala, the Left Democratic Front also repeatedly won state elections. Under Surjeet's leadership, the CPI(M) opposed economic globalization and privatization, championing labor rights and peasant interests. In 2000 the Left Front held about 40 seats in the Lok Sabha, serving as an important balancing force in national politics, though its voter base was concentrated in a few states.

role.zh: 党的最高决策者和全国政治协调人
role.en: Supreme party decision-maker and national political coordinator

title.zh: 前西孟加拉邦首席部长
title.en: Former Chief Minister of West Bengal

role.zh: 左翼阵线元老，世界最长任期共产主义首席部长
role.en: Left Front patriarch, world's longest-serving communist chief minister

role.zh: 2000年继任首席部长，主张引入工业投资
role.en: Successor as chief minister in 2000, advocated industrial investment

name.zh: 巴基斯坦伊斯兰共和国
巴基斯坦伊斯兰共和国

ruler.zh: 穆罕默德·拉菲克·塔拉尔／佩尔韦兹·穆沙拉夫

rulerTitle.zh: 总统／首席执行官兼陆军参谋长
rulerTitle.en: President / Chief Executive and Chief of Army Staff

governmentForm.zh: 名义上的联邦议会共和国，实际上由1999年政变后军方主导的行政体制统治
governmentForm.en: Nominally a federal parliamentary republic, in practice governed by a military-led executive order following the 1999 coup

socialStructure.zh: 社会由军方精英、文官官僚、地主与工商阶层、城市中产阶级、宗教人士、工人与广大农村农民构成，并存在明显的地区、语言与阶层差异
socialStructure.en: Society was composed of military elites, civil bureaucrats, landed and business classes, an urban middle class, religious figures, workers, and a broad rural peasantry, with marked regional, linguistic, and class divisions

rulingClass.zh: 军方高层、联邦官僚体系、高级法官、主要地主家族及大城市商界精英
rulingClass.en: Senior military leadership, the federal bureaucracy, higher judiciary, major landed families, and urban business elites

succession.zh: 国家元首原则上依宪法程序产生，但2000年实际权力继承取决于军方指挥体系与临时宪制安排
succession.en: The head of state was theoretically determined by constitutional procedure, but in 2000 effective succession depended on the military command structure and provisional constitutional arrangements

structure.zh: 中央政府由首席执行官领导，保留总统职位、联邦秘书处、各部会与省级政府；国家安全委员会式的军政协调机制在实际决策中占主导地位，国会职能一度中断或受限
structure.en: The central government was led by the Chief Executive while retaining the presidency, federal secretariat, ministries, and provincial governments; a military-civil coordination system resembling a national security council dominated real decision-making, and parliamentary functions were suspended or constrained

function.zh: 负责国防政策、军政协调、军费与武装部队行政事务，但实际作战指挥主要掌握在军方总部
function.en: Handled defence policy, civil-military coordination, military budgeting, and administrative affairs of the armed forces, though operational command rested chiefly with the military high command

function.zh: 负责预算编制、税收政策、债务管理、外援协调和宏观经济稳定
function.en: Oversaw budgeting, tax policy, debt management, foreign assistance coordination, and macroeconomic stabilization

function.zh: 负责国内安全、边境管理、治安机构协调、移民与身份证明体系
function.en: Managed internal security, border administration, coordination of law-enforcement agencies, immigration, and identity systems

function.zh: 负责对外关系、驻外使团、双边与多边谈判以及克什米尔相关外交宣传
function.en: Conducted external relations, diplomatic missions, bilateral and multilateral negotiations, and diplomatic advocacy related to Kashmir

function.zh: 负责教育政策、课程标准、联邦教育项目与识字推广
function.en: Oversaw education policy, curriculum standards, federal education programs, and literacy promotion

function.zh: 负责公共卫生政策、疾病防控、基础医疗项目与国际卫生合作
function.en: Managed public health policy, disease control, basic medical programs, and international health cooperation

localAdmin.zh: 国家实行联邦制，下辖旁遮普、信德、西北边境省和俾路支省，以及联邦直辖部族地区、首都地区和北方地区；2000年前后地方治理正朝军方支持的地方政府改革方向调整，以削弱传统政党与省级精英影响
localAdmin.en: The state was federal, comprising Punjab, Sindh, the North-West Frontier Province, and Balochistan, along with the Federally Administered Tribal Areas, the Capital Territory, and the Northern Areas; around 2000 local administration was being reshaped through military-backed local government reforms aimed at reducing the influence of traditional parties and provincial elites

legalSystem.zh: 法律体系混合英国普通法传统、成文法、伊斯兰法原则与军事临时法令；高等法院和最高法院继续运作，但在政变后司法独立面临压力
legalSystem.en: The legal system combined British common law tradition, statutory law, Islamic legal principles, and military provisional orders; the high courts and Supreme Court continued to function, but judicial independence faced pressure after the coup

taxationSystem.zh: 税收以关税、销售税、所得税、公司税和消费税为主，联邦征收占主导地位；税基狭窄、逃税普遍、农业收入征税有限，使财政高度依赖间接税和外部融资
taxationSystem.en: Taxation relied mainly on customs duties, sales tax, income tax, corporate tax, and excise duties, with the federal government dominant in collection; a narrow tax base, widespread evasion, and limited agricultural income taxation made public finance heavily dependent on indirect taxes and external financing

religion.zh: 伊斯兰教为国教，绝大多数居民为穆斯林，以逊尼派为主，什叶派占重要少数；宗教在国家认同、法律与公共生活中具有核心地位，同时少数印度教徒、基督徒、锡克教徒及其他群体继续存在
religion.en: Islam was the state religion, and the overwhelming majority of the population was Muslim, predominantly Sunni with a significant Shia minority; religion held a central place in national identity, law, and public life, while Hindu, Christian, Sikh, and other minorities remained present

philosophy.zh: 主流思想融合伊斯兰政治理念、巴基斯坦民族主义、后殖民国家建构、军方秩序观念与有限的议会民主传统
philosophy.en: Mainstream thought blended Islamic political ideas, Pakistani nationalism, postcolonial state-building, military concepts of order, and a limited parliamentary democratic tradition

writingSystem.zh: 主要书写系统为阿拉伯字母的波斯-乌尔都变体，乌尔都语为国家语言；英语广泛用于政府、司法、高等教育与商业；各省亦使用旁遮普语、信德语、普什图语、俾路支语等文字传统
writingSystem.en: The principal writing system was the Perso-Arabic script in its Urdu form, with Urdu serving as the national language; English was widely used in government, law, higher education, and business; provincial languages such as Punjabi, Sindhi, Pashto, and Balochi also maintained written traditions

culturalAchievements.zh: 巴基斯坦在乌尔都文学、伊斯兰建筑、卡瓦利音乐、电视戏剧、板球文化、纺织工艺与南亚穆斯林知识传统方面具有显著成就；拉合尔、卡拉奇和伊斯兰堡为重要文化中心
culturalAchievements.en: Pakistan possessed notable achievements in Urdu literature, Islamic architecture, qawwali music, television drama, cricket culture, textile crafts, and the intellectual traditions of South Asian Muslims; Lahore, Karachi, and Islamabad were major cultural centers

languageFamily.zh: 主要语言分属印欧语系印度-伊朗语族，包括乌尔都语、旁遮普语、信德语、普什图语和俾路支语；另有达尔德语支、布拉灰语等语言
languageFamily.en: Most major languages belonged to the Indo-European family, especially the Indo-Iranian branch, including Urdu, Punjabi, Sindhi, Pashto, and Balochi; Dardic languages and Brahui were also present

gdpDescription.zh: 2000年前后巴基斯坦经济规模属中低收入大型发展中经济体，受制于外债、国际制裁、政治不稳定、贫弱税基与基础设施瓶颈；同时拥有庞大农业基础、纺织出口能力和海外汇款来源
gdpDescription.en: Around 2000 Pakistan was a large lower-middle-income developing economy constrained by external debt, international sanctions, political instability, a weak tax base, and infrastructure bottlenecks; at the same time it possessed a substantial agricultural base, textile export capacity, and remittance inflows

mainIndustries.zh: 农业、纺织与服装、棉花加工、食品加工、水泥、化肥、皮革、轻工业、银行业、航运与小规模军工生产
mainIndustries.en: Agriculture, textiles and garments, cotton processing, food processing, cement, fertilizer, leather, light manufacturing, banking, shipping, and limited defence production

tradeGoods.zh: 主要出口棉纱、纺织品、服装、皮革制品、大米、运动用品和地毯；主要进口石油、机械、化工品、运输设备、电子产品与工业原料
tradeGoods.en: Major exports included cotton yarn, textiles, garments, leather goods, rice, sporting goods, and carpets; major imports included petroleum, machinery, chemicals, transport equipment, electronics, and industrial inputs

householdWealth.zh: 家庭财富分布高度不均，城市工商阶层与大地主拥有相对可观资产，而多数农村家庭和城市非正规就业者资产有限，储蓄常以现金、黄金饰品、土地和家族网络形式保存
householdWealth.en: Household wealth was highly unequal, with urban commercial groups and major landlords holding comparatively substantial assets while most rural families and urban informal workers possessed limited wealth, often stored in cash, gold jewelry, land, and family networks

economicSystem.zh: 混合经济，具有市场化私营部门、重要国有企业、农业地主结构和依赖国际金融机构支持的宏观调整政策
economicSystem.en: A mixed economy with a market-oriented private sector, significant state-owned enterprises, agrarian landlord structures, and macroeconomic adjustment policies dependent on international financial institutions

treasuryDescription.zh: 中央财政现金缓冲有限，外汇储备脆弱，财政稳定很大程度依赖债务展期、外援、汇款与进口管理
treasuryDescription.en: The central fiscal cash buffer was limited, foreign exchange reserves were fragile, and fiscal stability depended heavily on debt rescheduling, foreign aid, remittances, and import management

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政政策以赤字控制、税制改革、争取国际金融机构支持、维持国防开支和稳定汇率为核心，但受政治合法性不足与社会需求增长掣肘
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy centered on deficit control, tax reform, securing support from international financial institutions, sustaining defence expenditure, and maintaining exchange-rate stability, but it was constrained by limited political legitimacy and growing social demands

description.zh: 陆军是国家最重要的武装力量与政治力量核心，负责对印常规威慑、克什米尔方向部署、边境安全与国内支援任务
description.en: The army was the state's most important military service and the core political force, responsible for conventional deterrence against India, deployments along the Kashmir front, border security, and domestic support missions

description.zh: 空军承担防空、对地支援、战略威慑支援与战备巡逻，装备美制与中法系混合机队
description.en: The air force handled air defence, ground support, support for strategic deterrence, and readiness patrols, operating a mixed fleet of American, Chinese, and French-origin aircraft

description.zh: 海军规模较小，主要负责阿拉伯海沿岸防御、港口保护、海上交通线安全与潜艇威慑
description.en: The navy was comparatively small and focused on Arabian Sea coastal defence, port protection, sea-lane security, and submarine deterrence

technology.zh: 军队拥有现代化常规武器体系、导弹项目和已证明的核武能力，但后勤、维护能力、国产化程度与高端电子战体系仍受财政和制裁限制
technology.en: The military possessed modern conventional weapons, missile programs, and a demonstrated nuclear weapons capability, though logistics, maintenance capacity, indigenization, and advanced electronic warfare systems remained constrained by finances and sanctions

threats.zh: 主要威胁来自与印度的长期敌对、克什米尔冲突、边境摩擦、阿富汗方向的不稳定外溢、宗派暴力与国内武装组织活动
threats.en: Primary threats came from long-term hostility with India, the Kashmir conflict, border friction, spillover instability from Afghanistan, sectarian violence, and the activity of domestic militant organizations

populationDescription.zh: 人口约1.38亿，是当时世界人口大国之一，年轻人口比例高，增长迅速，地区分布以旁遮普最为密集，卡拉奇等城市吸纳大量移民与流动人口
populationDescription.en: With about 138 million people, Pakistan was one of the world's more populous states at the time, with a youthful and rapidly growing population; settlement was densest in Punjab, while cities such as Karachi absorbed large migrant and mobile populations

socialClasses.zh: 上层包括军官集团、大地主、工业金融家和高级官僚；中层包括专业人士、小企业主、教师与城市白领；下层包括农业佃户、小农、产业工人、非正规部门劳动者和失业人口。宗族、宗派、族群与地区身份对社会流动影响显著
socialClasses.en: The upper strata included the officer corps, large landlords, industrial and financial magnates, and senior bureaucrats; the middle strata included professionals, small business owners, teachers, and urban white-collar workers; the lower strata included tenant farmers, smallholders, industrial laborers, informal-sector workers, and the unemployed. Clan, sectarian, ethnic, and regional identities strongly shaped social mobility

allies.zh: 主要伙伴包括中国、沙特阿拉伯、阿联酋及部分伊斯兰国家；同时与美国保持复杂但重要的安全与外交接触
allies.en: Principal partners included China, Saudi Arabia, the United Arab Emirates, and several Islamic states; Pakistan also maintained a complex but important security and diplomatic relationship with the United States

enemies.zh: 主要对手是印度；与阿富汗塔利班问题相关的国际压力、与伊朗在部分边境和地区事务上的摩擦，以及与西方国家因核项目和政变引发的紧张也构成外交挑战
enemies.en: The principal rival was India; international pressure linked to the Taliban issue in Afghanistan, frictions with Iran in some border and regional matters, and tensions with Western states over the nuclear program and the coup also posed diplomatic challenges

foreignPolicy.zh: 对外政策以制衡印度、争取克什米尔问题国际化、维持与中国和海湾国家的战略联系、避免全面国际孤立、并在核威慑与经济援助之间寻求平衡为核心
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign policy centered on balancing India, seeking international attention to the Kashmir issue, preserving strategic ties with China and the Gulf states, avoiding complete international isolation, and balancing nuclear deterrence with the need for economic assistance

keyInnovations.zh: 关键技术能力包括核武器与相关运载系统、弹道导弹项目、军用航空维护、灌溉农业体系、纺织工业生产、通信网络扩展及不断发展的软件与工程教育基础
keyInnovations.en: Key technological capabilities included nuclear weapons and related delivery systems, ballistic missile programs, military aviation maintenance, irrigated agriculture, textile industrial production, expanding communications networks, and a developing base in software and engineering education

strengths.zh: 战略位置重要，军队组织严密，拥有核威慑，与中国及海湾国家关系较强，农业基础广阔，纺织出口和海外汇款提供支撑，国家认同在安全议题上具有较强动员力
strengths.en: Pakistan's strengths included its strategic location, highly organized military, nuclear deterrent, strong ties with China and Gulf states, broad agricultural base, support from textile exports and overseas remittances, and a national identity capable of strong mobilization on security issues

weaknesses.zh: 政治制度脆弱，军政失衡，债务和财政压力沉重，教育与卫生投入不足，贫富差距和地区差异明显，宗派与族群暴力持续，民主合法性和法治受到削弱
weaknesses.en: Its weaknesses included fragile political institutions, civil-military imbalance, heavy debt and fiscal pressure, inadequate investment in education and health, clear inequality and regional disparities, persistent sectarian and ethnic violence, and weakened democratic legitimacy and rule of law

outlook.zh: 2000年的巴基斯坦处于高风险转折点：若能恢复稳定治理、改善财政和吸引外资，则有望维持安全国家与区域中等强国地位；若印巴危机升级、国内极端主义扩张或经济失衡加深，则将面临长期不稳定
outlook.en: In 2000 Pakistan stood at a high-risk turning point: if it could restore stable governance, improve public finance, and attract investment, it could maintain its position as a security state and regional middle power; if Indo-Pakistani crises intensified, domestic extremism expanded, or economic imbalances deepened, it would face prolonged instability

description.zh: 在1999年军事政变后进入军方主导统治，并与印度持续紧张。
description.en: After the 1999 coup, the state was under military-led rule amid continuing tensions with India.

dynasty.zh: 孟加拉人民共和国时期

governmentForm.zh: 议会民主制下的单一制共和国，名义国家元首为总统，行政权由总理及内阁主导
governmentForm.en: A unitary parliamentary republic in which the president serves as formal head of state while executive power is led by the prime minister and cabinet

socialStructure.zh: 社会以农村人口为主，但城市化加速；地主、商人、工业资本家、公务员、专业人士、工人和小农并存，宗教与家族网络对社会组织仍具重要影响
socialStructure.en: Society remained predominantly rural but was urbanizing quickly; landholders, merchants, industrial capitalists, civil servants, professionals, workers, and small farmers coexisted, while religious and kinship networks remained important to social organization

rulingClass.zh: 民选政治精英、官僚体系、高级军官、工商界领袖与地方权势家族
rulingClass.en: Elected political elites, the civil bureaucracy, senior military officers, business leaders, and influential local families

succession.zh: 政府通过议会选举形成，总理由议会多数派或执政联盟领袖出任；总统依宪法程序间接或经议会机制产生
succession.en: Governments were formed through parliamentary elections, with the prime minister drawn from the majority party or ruling coalition; the president was selected through constitutional parliamentary procedures

structure.zh: 中央政府由总理、内阁、国民议会、总统府、最高法院及常设公务员体系构成；地方层级包括专区、县、乌帕齐拉和联合理事会
structure.en: The central government consisted of the prime minister, cabinet, Jatiya Sangsad, presidency, Supreme Court, and a permanent civil service; local administration was organized through divisions, districts, upazilas, and union councils

function.zh: 编制预算、税收政策、财政管理、外援协调与公共债务管理
function.en: Budget preparation, tax policy, fiscal management, foreign aid coordination, and public debt administration

function.zh: 负责国内治安、警务、边防协调、监狱与内部安全
function.en: Domestic order, policing, border coordination, prisons, and internal security

function.zh: 统筹国防政策、军政协调与武装力量行政管理
function.en: Defense policy, civil-military coordination, and administrative oversight of the armed forces

function.zh: 粮食生产、灌溉政策、农业推广与农村发展支持
function.en: Food production, irrigation policy, agricultural extension, and support for rural development

function.zh: 出口促进、贸易谈判、进口监管与产业商业政策
function.en: Export promotion, trade negotiations, import regulation, and commercial policy

function.zh: 学校体系、高等教育管理、课程政策与识字计划
function.en: School systems, higher education administration, curriculum policy, and literacy programs

localAdmin.zh: 地方行政实行中央监督下的分级管理，专区长官与县行政长官多来自国家公务员体系，基层由民选联合理事会和市政机构承担部分公共事务
localAdmin.en: Local administration operated through a hierarchical system under central supervision, with divisional and district officers largely drawn from the civil service, while elected union councils and municipal bodies handled part of local public affairs

legalSystem.zh: 以普通法传统为主，结合宪法、议会立法、行政法规和部分个人身份事务中的宗教法实践；最高法院拥有司法审查权
legalSystem.en: The legal system was based mainly on common law traditions, combined with the constitution, parliamentary statutes, administrative regulations, and religious law in parts of personal status matters; the Supreme Court possessed judicial review authority

taxationSystem.zh: 税收以关税、增值税、消费税、所得税和企业税为主，征管能力有限，外贸税与间接税在财政中占较高比重
taxationSystem.en: Taxation relied on customs duties, value-added tax, excise taxes, income tax, and corporate taxation, though collection capacity was limited, and trade taxes and indirect taxes formed a significant share of revenue

religion.zh: 以逊尼派伊斯兰教为主，同时有重要的印度教、佛教和基督教少数群体；宗教节庆深刻影响社会生活与公共节律
religion.en: Sunni Islam predominated, alongside significant Hindu, Buddhist, and Christian minorities; religious festivals strongly shaped social life and the public calendar

philosophy.zh: 国家文化兼具孟加拉民族主义、伊斯兰社会价值、世俗宪政传统以及语言运动所形成的文化自觉
philosophy.en: The country's intellectual life combined Bengali nationalism, Islamic social values, secular constitutional traditions, and the cultural consciousness shaped by the Language Movement

writingSystem.zh: 主要使用孟加拉文书写系统，政府、文学、教育和媒体广泛采用；英语在高等行政、法律和商业领域仍具重要地位
writingSystem.en: The Bengali script was the principal writing system used in government, literature, education, and media; English remained important in higher administration, law, and commerce

culturalAchievements.zh: 现代孟加拉文学、诗歌、电影、民歌、巴乌尔传统、独立战争记忆文化以及国际母语日相关文化认同均具鲜明特色；服装制造与城市流行文化也塑造了新型社会身份
culturalAchievements.en: Modern Bangladeshi literature, poetry, cinema, folk music, Baul traditions, the memory culture of the Liberation War, and identity linked to International Mother Language Day were distinctive; garment production and urban popular culture also shaped new social identities

languageFamily.zh: 官方与主体语言孟加拉语属于印欧语系印度-雅利安语支，另有乌尔都语、查克玛语及多种少数民族语言
languageFamily.en: The official and majority language, Bengali, belongs to the Indo-European Indo-Aryan branch; Urdu, Chakma, and various minority languages were also present

gdpDescription.zh: 2000年孟加拉国经济仍属低收入发展中国家，但在人口规模、农业基础、海外汇款和成衣出口推动下维持增长。经济结构正在由传统农业逐步转向劳动密集型制造和服务业
gdpDescription.en: In 2000 Bangladesh remained a low-income developing economy, but sustained growth through its large population, agricultural base, remittances, and ready-made garment exports. Its structure was gradually shifting from traditional agriculture toward labor-intensive manufacturing and services

mainIndustries.zh: 成衣和纺织、黄麻及黄麻制品、农业、渔业、皮革、茶叶加工、食品加工、建筑、港口和运输服务
mainIndustries.en: Ready-made garments and textiles, jute and jute goods, agriculture, fisheries, leather, tea processing, food processing, construction, ports, and transport services

tradeGoods.zh: 主要出口服装、针织品、黄麻制品、冷冻水产品、皮革和茶叶；主要进口机械、棉花、石油、化肥、化工品、粮食和工业原料
tradeGoods.en: Major exports included garments, knitwear, jute products, frozen fish and shrimp, leather, and tea; major imports included machinery, cotton, petroleum, fertilizers, chemicals, food grains, and industrial inputs

householdWealth.zh: 家庭财富总体有限，多数家庭依靠小规模农业、非正规劳动、海外劳务汇款或低工资工业就业维持生计；土地、住房和黄金饰品是常见储值形式
householdWealth.en: Household wealth was generally modest, with most families relying on small-scale farming, informal labor, remittances from overseas work, or low-wage industrial employment; land, housing, and gold jewelry were common stores of value

economicSystem.zh: 混合型市场经济，国家保留对宏观调控、基础设施和部分金融机构的较强影响，同时私营企业和出口导向工业迅速扩张
economicSystem.en: A mixed market economy in which the state retained substantial influence over macroeconomic management, infrastructure, and parts of the financial sector, while private enterprise and export-oriented industry expanded rapidly

treasuryDescription.zh: 国库规模有限，现金储备和外汇缓冲较脆弱，财政平衡部分依赖外援、优惠贷款与多边机构支持
treasuryDescription.en: The treasury remained limited in scale, with fragile cash reserves and foreign exchange buffers; fiscal balance depended partly on foreign aid, concessional loans, and support from multilateral institutions

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政政策以控制赤字、维持进口税收、扩大增值税基础并优先投入农村发展、教育和基础设施为主，但税基狭窄与征收能力不足构成长期限制
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy focused on containing the deficit, maintaining import-based revenues, broadening the VAT base, and prioritizing rural development, education, and infrastructure, though a narrow tax base and weak collection remained long-term constraints

description.zh: 军队主体，负责国土防御、边境支援、国内紧急状态应对和联合国维和任务，装备以轻重步兵、火炮和有限装甲力量为主
description.en: The core service, responsible for territorial defense, border support, domestic emergency response, and UN peacekeeping missions, equipped mainly with infantry, artillery, and limited armored forces

description.zh: 负责孟加拉湾海域巡逻、港口安全、近海防御和海上交通线保护，能力以近岸作战与巡逻为主
description.en: Responsible for Bay of Bengal patrols, port security, coastal defense, and protection of sea lines of communication, with capabilities centered on littoral warfare and patrol operations

description.zh: 承担空域监视、运输、近距离空中支援和有限防空任务，装备规模较小且现代化程度有限
description.en: Handled air surveillance, transport, close air support, and limited air defense missions, with a relatively small force and constrained modernization

description.zh: 包括边境防卫、步枪营和辅助安全力量，负责边界巡逻、反走私、内部安全和灾害救援支援
description.en: Included border guards, rifle battalions, and auxiliary security forces responsible for frontier patrol, anti-smuggling operations, internal security, and disaster-relief support

commanderInChief.zh: 总统沙阿布丁·艾哈迈德（名义三军统帅），政府实际由总理与军种指挥体系主导
commanderInChief.en: President Shahabuddin Ahmed as formal commander-in-chief, while practical direction rested with the prime minister and the service command structure

technology.zh: 军事技术处于发展中水平，装备多为冷战时期来源，依赖进口维护与有限升级；在通信、机动和海岸监视方面逐步改善
technology.en: Military technology stood at a developing level, with much equipment of Cold War origin and reliant on imported maintenance and limited upgrades; communications, mobility, and coastal surveillance were gradually improving

threats.zh: 主要安全挑战包括与印度的边界摩擦、走私与非法越境、海上资源争议、国内政治动荡风险以及洪水、气旋等非传统安全威胁
threats.en: Main security challenges included border frictions with India, smuggling and illegal crossings, maritime resource disputes, risks of domestic political unrest, and non-traditional threats such as floods and cyclones

populationDescription.zh: 全国人口极为稠密，集中分布于恒河—布拉马普特拉—梅格纳三角洲和平原地区；人口年轻，劳动力充足，但人均资源紧张
populationDescription.en: The population was extremely dense, concentrated in the Ganges-Brahmaputra-Meghna delta and plains; it was youthful and labor-abundant, though resources per person were strained

socialClasses.zh: 主要社会阶层包括农村小农与无地农民、城市非正规劳动者、成衣工人、公务员、教师与专业人士、中小企业主、大商人及政治家族；社会流动性存在，但贫困人口比例仍高
socialClasses.en: Major social classes included rural smallholders and landless peasants, urban informal laborers, garment workers, civil servants, teachers and professionals, small and medium business owners, large merchants, and political families; social mobility existed, but poverty remained widespread

allies.zh: 与印度保持重要而复杂的邻国关系；与南亚区域合作联盟成员、多数伊斯兰国家、日本、欧盟、美国和联合国体系维持合作，尤其依赖发展援助、贸易准入和劳务输出渠道
allies.en: Bangladesh maintained an important though complex relationship with India; it also cooperated with SAARC members, many Muslim-majority countries, Japan, the European Union, the United States, and the United Nations system, particularly for development aid, market access, and labor migration channels

enemies.zh: 2000年无正式国家敌国，但与部分邻国存在边界、移民、水资源和贸易争端，国内也警惕极端主义与跨境武装网络渗透
enemies.en: It had no formal state enemy in 2000, though disputes existed with some neighbors over borders, migration, water resources, and trade, while the state also remained wary of extremism and cross-border militant networks

foreignPolicy.zh: 外交政策强调不结盟传统、地区合作、发展援助吸引、对外劳务输出、联合国维和参与以及在伊斯兰世界与南亚之间维持平衡
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign policy emphasized a non-aligned tradition, regional cooperation, attracting development assistance, overseas labor deployment, participation in UN peacekeeping, and balancing ties between the Islamic world and South Asia

keyInnovations.zh: 关键发展包括灌溉农业扩张、高产稻种应用、微型信贷模式、电信网络起步扩展、成衣生产组织体系、公共卫生与非政府组织驱动的发展模式
keyInnovations.en: Key developments included the expansion of irrigated agriculture, use of high-yield rice varieties, microcredit models, the early spread of telecommunications networks, organized garment production systems, and public health and NGO-driven development approaches

strengths.zh: 优势在于人口规模庞大、劳动力成本低、农业韧性增强、成衣出口竞争力上升、侨汇与国际援助支撑明显，且政治制度在竞争性选举框架下总体运转
strengths.en: Its strengths lay in its large population, low labor costs, improved agricultural resilience, rising competitiveness in garment exports, and strong support from remittances and international aid, while the political system broadly functioned within a competitive electoral framework

weaknesses.zh: 弱点包括人均收入低、基础设施不足、税基狭窄、金融与行政能力有限、城市拥挤、腐败问题、能源约束以及对自然灾害高度脆弱
weaknesses.en: Weaknesses included low per capita income, insufficient infrastructure, a narrow tax base, limited financial and administrative capacity, urban overcrowding, corruption, energy constraints, and extreme vulnerability to natural disasters

outlook.zh: 若能维持政治稳定、扩大基础教育、改善治理并继续推动出口导向工业与农村发展，孟加拉国具有持续增长潜力；但若党争激化或灾害冲击加重，发展进程将明显受阻
outlook.en: If political stability could be maintained, basic education expanded, governance improved, and export-oriented industry and rural development continued, Bangladesh had strong potential for sustained growth; however, intensified partisan conflict or severe disaster shocks could significantly hinder progress

description.zh: 恒河三角洲人口稠密国家，以议会政治和制衣出口为特征。
description.en: A densely populated delta state marked by parliamentary politics and garment exports.

ruler.zh: 努尔苏丹·纳扎尔巴耶夫

governmentForm.zh: 超级总统制共和国。纳扎尔巴耶夫自1991年独立以来执政，权力高度集中。1997年迁都阿斯塔纳。
governmentForm.en: Super-presidential republic. Nazarbayev in power since 1991 independence, highly concentrated power. Capital moved to Astana in 1997.

socialStructure.zh: 以大、中、小三个玉兹（жүз）部族联盟为基础，权贵精英与能源寡头主导社会上层。
socialStructure.en: Based on three zhuz (Great, Middle, Lesser) tribal confederations, ruling elites and energy oligarchs dominating upper society.

rulingClass.zh: 纳扎尔巴耶夫家族与亲信网络、安全机构高层、能源与矿业寡头。
rulingClass.en: Nazarbayev family and inner circle, security apparatus leadership, energy and mining oligarchs.

succession.zh: 纳扎尔巴耶夫无明确继承人安排，总统选举为控制性选举。
succession.en: Nazarbayev had no clear succession arrangements, presidential elections controlled.

structure.zh: 强总统制政府，议会功能弱化。总统任命总理和州长。
structure.en: Strong presidential government, weakened parliament. President appoints PM and governors.

function.zh: 国家权力核心。
function.en: Core of state power.

function.zh: 管理国内安全与情报。
function.en: Managing domestic security and intelligence.

localAdmin.zh: 分14个州（含2个直辖市），州长由总统任命。
localAdmin.en: 14 regions (including 2 cities), governors appointed by president.

legalSystem.zh: 大陆法系与苏联遗产混合。
legalSystem.en: Mix of civil law and Soviet legacy.

taxationSystem.zh: 石油天然气出口收入为主要财源，推进税制改革以吸引外资。
taxationSystem.en: Oil and gas export revenue as main fiscal source, tax reform to attract FDI.

religion.zh: 逊尼派伊斯兰教为主，世俗国家体制。俄罗斯东正教徒占少数。
religion.en: Sunni Islam predominant, secular state. Russian Orthodox minority.

philosophy.zh: 后苏联民族建构与「欧亚桥梁」国家定位。
philosophy.en: Post-Soviet nation-building and 'Eurasian bridge' national positioning.

culturalAchievements.zh: 拜科努尔航天基地、游牧文化传统、阿斯塔纳新首都建设。
culturalAchievements.en: Baikonur Cosmodrome, nomadic cultural traditions, Astana new capital construction.

languageFamily.zh: 哈萨克语（突厥语族）为国语，俄语广泛使用。
languageFamily.en: Kazakh (Turkic) as national language, Russian widely used.

gdpDescription.zh: 中亚最大经济体（2000年GDP约180亿美元），油气出口为支柱。正推进大型油气项目开发（田吉兹、卡沙甘）。
gdpDescription.en: Largest Central Asian economy (~$18B GDP in 2000), oil and gas exports as pillar. Developing major projects (Tengiz, Kashagan).

mainIndustries.zh: 石油天然气、铀矿、金属冶炼、粮食生产
mainIndustries.en: Oil and gas, uranium, metal smelting, grain production

tradeGoods.zh: 原油、天然气、铀、金属、粮食
tradeGoods.en: Crude oil, natural gas, uranium, metals, grain

economicSystem.zh: 国家资本主义，能源领域国有化与外资合作并行。
economicSystem.en: State capitalism, nationalization and FDI cooperation in energy sector.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 建立石油基金稳定财政。
fiscalPolicy.en: Establishing oil fund for fiscal stabilization.

description.zh: 苏联遗留装备为主，包括T-72坦克与BMP战车。
description.en: Primarily Soviet-era equipment, including T-72 tanks and BMPs.

description.zh: 苏制米格-29与苏-27战斗机。
description.en: Soviet MiG-29 and Su-27 fighters.

description.zh: 边境防御与国内安全。
description.en: Border defense and domestic security.

technology.zh: 苏联遗留装备为主，拜科努尔航天基地（租借给俄罗斯）。
technology.en: Primarily Soviet-era equipment, Baikonur Cosmodrome (leased to Russia).

threats.zh: 阿富汗方向不稳定、边境划界争端。
threats.en: Afghan instability, border demarcation disputes.

populationDescription.zh: 人口约1490万。哈萨克族约53%（苏联解体后回升），俄罗斯族约30%（大量外迁）。

ethnicGroups.zh: 哈萨克族（约53%）、俄罗斯族（约30%）、乌兹别克族、乌克兰族、德意志裔等。
ethnicGroups.en: Kazakhs (~53%), Russians (~30%), Uzbeks, Ukrainians, ethnic Germans, etc.

socialClasses.zh: 权贵精英、能源产业管理层、城市知识分子、工人、农牧民。
socialClasses.en: Ruling elites, energy industry management, urban intellectuals, workers, farmers and herders.

allies.zh: 俄罗斯（CIS/安全合作）、中国（边境和解/经贸）、美国（能源投资伙伴）、土耳其。
allies.en: Russia (CIS/security cooperation), China (border settlement/trade), US (energy investment partner), Turkey.

foreignPolicy.zh: 纳扎尔巴耶夫的「多向外交」——在俄、中、美之间保持平衡。推动中亚区域合作。
foreignPolicy.en: Nazarbayev's 'multi-vector diplomacy' — balancing Russia, China, and the US. Promoting Central Asian regional cooperation.

keyInnovations.zh: 拜科努尔航天基地、石油勘探开发技术（田吉兹/卡沙甘项目）。
keyInnovations.en: Baikonur Cosmodrome, oil exploration and development (Tengiz/Kashagan projects).

infrastructure.zh: 苏联遗留铁路与公路网络。阿斯塔纳新首都大规模基建。
infrastructure.en: Soviet-era rail and road network. Massive Astana new capital construction.

strengths.zh: 丰富油气与铀矿资源、战略位置、较高教育水平。
strengths.en: Rich oil/gas and uranium resources, strategic location, relatively high education level.

weaknesses.zh: 威权政治、荷兰病风险、俄族人口地缘隐患。
weaknesses.en: Authoritarian politics, Dutch disease risk, Russian minority geosecurity concerns.

outlook.zh: 随着油气项目投产，经济增长前景较强。但政治继承与多民族管理是长期挑战。
outlook.en: Strong growth prospects with oil/gas projects coming online. Political succession and multi-ethnic management as long-term challenges.

description.zh: 2000年的哈萨克斯坦在纳扎尔巴耶夫总统领导下推进国家建设与经济发展。作为全球第九大国和中亚最大经济体，哈萨克斯坦正开发田吉兹、卡沙甘等超大型油气项目。1997年迁都阿斯塔纳的宏大工程正在推进中。纳扎尔巴耶夫的「多向外交」在俄中美之间保持平衡。拜科努尔航天基地继续作为俄罗斯主要太空发射场运营。
description.en: Kazakhstan in 2000, under President Nazarbayev, advanced nation-building and economic development. As the world's 9th largest country and Central Asia's biggest economy, Kazakhstan was developing mega oil/gas projects like Tengiz and Kashagan. The grand Astana capital relocation from 1997 was underway. Nazarbayev's 'multi-vector diplomacy' balanced Russia, China, and the US. Baikonur Cosmodrome continued operating as Russia's primary space launch facility.

governmentForm.zh: 高度威权总统制。卡里莫夫自苏联时期即掌权，独立后延续统治。严厉打压反对派与宗教组织。
governmentForm.en: Highly authoritarian presidential system. Karimov held power since Soviet era, continued rule after independence. Harsh suppression of opposition and religious organizations.

socialStructure.zh: 以地区氏族网络为基础，塔什干、撒马尔罕、费尔干纳三大区域精英竞争。
socialStructure.en: Based on regional clan networks, competition among Tashkent, Samarkand, and Fergana regional elites.

rulingClass.zh: 卡里莫夫及撒马尔罕派系、安全机构（SNB）、棉花与能源国企管理层。
rulingClass.en: Karimov and Samarkand faction, security apparatus (SNB), cotton and energy SOE management.

succession.zh: 卡里莫夫不容许继承人安排讨论，权力完全个人化。
succession.en: Karimov tolerated no succession planning discussions, fully personalized power.

structure.zh: 强总统制，安全机构（SNB）权力极大。
structure.en: Strong presidency, security apparatus (SNB) extremely powerful.

function.zh: 国家权力核心。
function.en: Core of state power.

function.zh: 管理安全、情报与政治控制。
function.en: Managing security, intelligence, and political control.

localAdmin.zh: 12个州与1个自治共和国（卡拉卡尔帕克斯坦）。

legalSystem.zh: 苏联遗产法律体系，司法受行政强烈控制。
legalSystem.en: Soviet-legacy legal system, judiciary strongly controlled by executive.

taxationSystem.zh: 国家控制经济为主，棉花出口为重要财源。税制复杂且不透明。
taxationSystem.en: State-controlled economy dominant, cotton exports as important revenue. Complex and opaque tax system.

religion.zh: 逊尼派伊斯兰教（约90%），世俗国家体制但严厉打压非官方宗教活动。
religion.en: Sunni Islam (~90%), secular state but harsh crackdown on unofficial religious activities.

philosophy.zh: 帖木儿被奉为国家象征。后苏联民族建构与世俗伊斯兰传统结合。
philosophy.en: Tamerlane elevated as national symbol. Post-Soviet nation-building combined with secular Islamic tradition.

writingSystem.zh: 西里尔与拉丁字母并行（1993年开始转换）。
writingSystem.en: Cyrillic and Latin alphabets in parallel (transition began 1993).

culturalAchievements.zh: 撒马尔罕/布哈拉/希瓦历史古城保护、丝绸之路文化遗产。
culturalAchievements.en: Samarkand/Bukhara/Khiva historic city preservation, Silk Road cultural heritage.

languageFamily.zh: 乌兹别克语（突厥语族），俄语仍广泛使用。

gdpDescription.zh: 中亚人口最多国家，经济以棉花、黄金、天然气出口与国有工业为基础。实行严格外汇管制。
gdpDescription.en: Most populous Central Asian country, economy based on cotton, gold, gas exports and state industry. Strict foreign exchange controls.

mainIndustries.zh: 棉花种植（世界前五大出口国）、黄金开采、天然气、纺织、汽车组装
mainIndustries.en: Cotton (top 5 world exporter), gold mining, natural gas, textiles, auto assembly

tradeGoods.zh: 棉花、黄金、天然气、纺织品

economicSystem.zh: 国家控制经济，棉花强制收购体系（受国际批评的强制劳动）。外汇管制严格。
economicSystem.en: State-controlled economy, cotton forced procurement system (internationally criticized forced labor). Strict forex controls.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 国家高度控制财政，棉花与黄金出口为支柱。
fiscalPolicy.en: Highly state-controlled fiscal policy, cotton and gold exports as pillars.

description.zh: 中亚最大常备军。苏联遗留装备。
description.en: Largest standing army in Central Asia. Soviet-era equipment.

description.zh: 苏制战机，注重阿富汗方向防御。
description.en: Soviet aircraft, focused on Afghan defense.

description.zh: 费尔干纳盆地安全与阿富汗边境防御。
description.en: Fergana Valley security and Afghan border defense.

threats.zh: 阿富汗塔利班（1999年乌兹别克斯坦伊斯兰运动袭击）、费尔干纳盆地极端主义。
threats.en: Afghan Taliban (1999 IMU attacks), Fergana Valley extremism.

populationDescription.zh: 中亚人口最多（约2480万），乌兹别克族约80%。
populationDescription.en: Most populous Central Asian country (~24.8M), Uzbeks ~80%.

ethnicGroups.zh: 乌兹别克族（约80%）、塔吉克族（约5%）、俄罗斯族（约6%）等。

allies.zh: 美国（反恐合作）、俄罗斯（传统关系但卡里莫夫保持独立性）、中国。
allies.en: US (counter-terrorism cooperation), Russia (traditional ties but Karimov maintained independence), China.

enemies.zh: 阿富汗塔利班/乌兹别克斯坦伊斯兰运动（IMU）。
enemies.en: Afghan Taliban / Islamic Movement of Uzbekistan (IMU).

foreignPolicy.zh: 卡里莫夫坚持独立自主，拒绝加入俄主导军事联盟。与美国在反恐领域合作。
foreignPolicy.en: Karimov insisted on independence, refused to join Russian-led military alliances. Counter-terrorism cooperation with the US.

keyInnovations.zh: 苏联遗留工业基础、棉花加工技术、GM合资汽车工厂。
keyInnovations.en: Soviet-era industrial base, cotton processing technology, GM JV auto plant.

strengths.zh: 中亚最大人口、较完整工业基础、丰富文化遗产、战略位置。
strengths.en: Largest Central Asian population, relatively complete industrial base, rich cultural heritage, strategic location.

weaknesses.zh: 高度威权、棉花强制劳动、封闭经济、人权状况恶劣。
weaknesses.en: Highly authoritarian, cotton forced labor, closed economy, poor human rights.

outlook.zh: 卡里莫夫统治下经济封闭但基本稳定，长期发展取决于政治继承与改革意愿。
outlook.en: Under Karimov economically closed but basically stable, long-term depends on political succession and reform willingness.

description.zh: 2000年的乌兹别克斯坦在卡里莫夫总统的威权统治下保持基本稳定。作为中亚人口最多的国家（2480万），经济以棉花、黄金和天然气出口为支柱，但实行严格外汇管制与国家控制。1999年乌兹别克斯坦伊斯兰运动（IMU）的恐怖袭击加剧了安全管控。撒马尔罕、布哈拉、希瓦等丝绸之路古城保存着辉煌的文明遗产。
description.en: Uzbekistan in 2000 maintained basic stability under President Karimov's authoritarian rule. As Central Asia's most populous country (24.8M), the economy was based on cotton, gold, and gas exports, but with strict forex controls and state dominance. The 1999 Islamic Movement of Uzbekistan (IMU) attacks intensified security controls. Silk Road cities like Samarkand, Bukhara, and Khiva preserved magnificent civilizational heritage.

ruler.zh: 萨帕尔穆拉特·尼亚佐夫

dynasty.zh: 尼亚佐夫个人崇拜统治

governmentForm.zh: 极端个人崇拜式独裁。尼亚佐夫自封「土库曼巴希」（土库曼之父），被授予终身总统。以《鲁赫纳玛》为国家意识形态基础。
governmentForm.en: Extreme personality cult dictatorship. Niyazov self-titled 'Turkmenbashi' (Father of Turkmen), granted lifelong presidency. Ruhnama as state ideological foundation.

socialStructure.zh: 部族结构影响深远，阿哈尔部族主导。极端个人崇拜渗透社会各层面。
socialStructure.en: Tribal structure deeply influential, Akhal tribe dominant. Extreme personality cult permeating all social levels.

rulingClass.zh: 尼亚佐夫个人独裁，阿哈尔部族精英、安全机构。
rulingClass.en: Niyazov's personal dictatorship, Akhal tribal elites, security apparatus.

succession.zh: 尼亚佐夫为终身总统，无继承人安排。
succession.en: Niyazov as lifetime president, no succession arrangements.

structure.zh: 极端总统独裁制。《鲁赫纳玛》为必读国家教材。以月份与星期重新命名为尼亚佐夫家族名。
structure.en: Extreme presidential dictatorship. Ruhnama as mandatory national textbook. Months and days renamed after Niyazov's family.

function.zh: 国家唯一决策中心。
function.en: Sole decision-making center.

function.zh: 管理天然气开采与出口。
function.en: Managing gas extraction and export.

localAdmin.en: 5 provinces, governors fully subordinate to president.

legalSystem.zh: 总统凌驾于一切法律之上。

taxationSystem.zh: 高度国有化，居民享有免费天然气、水电补贴。
taxationSystem.en: Highly nationalized, citizens receive free gas, subsidized water and electricity.

religion.zh: 逊尼派伊斯兰教，但世俗化程度极高。尼亚佐夫将《鲁赫纳玛》置于《古兰经》同等地位。
religion.en: Sunni Islam, but extremely secularized. Niyazov placed Ruhnama on equal footing with the Quran.

philosophy.zh: 尼亚佐夫个人崇拜意识形态，《鲁赫纳玛》为核心。土库曼民族主义。
philosophy.en: Niyazov personality cult ideology, Ruhnama as core. Turkmen nationalism.

culturalAchievements.zh: 阿什哈巴德大规模建设、汗血宝马传统。
culturalAchievements.en: Ashgabat massive construction, Akhal-Teke horse tradition.

languageFamily.zh: 土库曼语（突厥语族）。

gdpDescription.zh: 经济几乎完全依赖天然气出口（全球第四大储量）。数据不透明。
gdpDescription.en: Economy almost entirely dependent on gas exports (world's 4th largest reserves). Opaque data.

mainIndustries.zh: 天然气、石油、棉花

economicSystem.zh: 完全国家控制经济，天然气收入用于维持庞大补贴体系。
economicSystem.en: Fully state-controlled economy, gas revenue sustaining massive subsidy system.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 天然气收入为财政唯一支柱。大量资金用于阿什哈巴德面子工程。
fiscalPolicy.en: Gas revenue as sole fiscal pillar. Large funds spent on Ashgabat vanity projects.

description.zh: 苏联遗留装备。
description.en: Soviet-era equipment.

description.zh: 政权保卫与边防。
description.en: Regime protection and border defense.

threats.zh: 阿富汗边境安全、里海划界争端。
threats.en: Afghan border security, Caspian demarcation disputes.

ethnicGroups.zh: 土库曼族（约77%）、乌兹别克族（约9%）、俄罗斯族（约7%）等。

allies.zh: 维持永久中立国地位。与俄罗斯保持天然气贸易关系。
allies.en: Maintained permanent neutrality. Gas trade relations with Russia.

foreignPolicy.zh: 1995年联合国承认的永久中立国。外交极为封闭。
foreignPolicy.en: UN-recognized permanent neutrality since 1995. Extremely closed diplomacy.

keyInnovations.zh: 天然气管道技术。
keyInnovations.en: Gas pipeline technology.

strengths.zh: 巨量天然气储量、永久中立国地位。
strengths.en: Massive gas reserves, permanent neutrality status.

weaknesses.zh: 极端个人崇拜、经济数据不透明、信息完全封锁。
weaknesses.en: Extreme personality cult, opaque economic data, total information blockade.

outlook.zh: 在尼亚佐夫统治下，国家完全封闭。天然气是唯一经济生命线。
outlook.en: Under Niyazov, the country was completely closed. Gas is the only economic lifeline.

description.zh: 2000年的土库曼斯坦处于尼亚佐夫「土库曼巴希」的极端个人崇拜统治下，是全球最封闭的国家之一。经济完全依赖天然气出口。尼亚佐夫以《鲁赫纳玛》为国家意识形态基础，将月份重新以自己和母亲的名字命名。居民享有免费天然气和水电补贴，但信息完全封锁，出国受严格限制。
description.en: Turkmenistan in 2000 was under the extreme personality cult of Niyazov 'Turkmenbashi', one of the world's most isolated countries. Economy entirely dependent on gas exports. Niyazov used Ruhnama as state ideology, renamed months after himself and his mother. Citizens received free gas and utility subsidies, but information was completely blocked and travel severely restricted.

governmentForm.zh: 总统制共和国。阿卡耶夫初期被视为中亚最民主的领导人，但逐渐走向威权。
governmentForm.en: Presidential republic. Akayev initially seen as Central Asia's most democratic leader, but gradually turning authoritarian.

socialStructure.zh: 南北部族对立。游牧传统深刻影响。公民社会在中亚最为活跃。
socialStructure.en: North-south tribal rivalry. Deep nomadic tradition influence. Most active civil society in Central Asia.

rulingClass.zh: 阿卡耶夫家族、北方部族精英、学术界出身的技术官僚。
rulingClass.en: Akayev family, northern tribal elites, academic-origin technocrats.

succession.zh: 名义上民主选举，但阿卡耶夫通过修宪延长任期。
succession.en: Nominally democratic elections, but Akayev extended terms through constitutional amendments.

structure.zh: 议会制与总统制混合，但阿卡耶夫逐渐集权。
structure.en: Mix of parliamentary and presidential systems, but Akayev gradually centralizing power.

function.zh: 国家决策核心。
function.en: Core of state decisions.

localAdmin.zh: 7个州与首都比什凯克。地方自治在中亚最为发展。
localAdmin.en: 7 regions and capital Bishkek. Most developed local autonomy in Central Asia.

legalSystem.zh: 苏联遗产法律体系，但较邻国略有司法独立性。
legalSystem.en: Soviet-legacy legal system, but slightly more judicial independence than neighbors.

taxationSystem.zh: 税基狭窄，高度依赖外国援助。
taxationSystem.en: Narrow tax base, highly dependent on foreign aid.

religion.zh: 逊尼派伊斯兰教为主，世俗传统强。
religion.en: Sunni Islam predominant, strong secular tradition.

philosophy.zh: 《玛纳斯》史诗为民族精神核心。游牧自由传统。
philosophy.en: Manas epic as core of national spirit. Nomadic freedom tradition.

culturalAchievements.zh: 《玛纳斯》史诗、毡房文化、天山自然遗产、作家钦吉斯·艾特马托夫文学遗产。
culturalAchievements.en: Manas epic, yurt culture, Tian Shan heritage, writer Chingiz Aitmatov's literary legacy.

languageFamily.zh: 吉尔吉斯语（突厥语族），俄语为官方语言。

gdpDescription.zh: 中亚最贫困国家之一。经济依赖黄金（库姆托金矿）、水电和外国援助。被称为中亚「民主实验室」。
gdpDescription.en: One of Central Asia's poorest. Economy dependent on gold (Kumtor), hydropower, and foreign aid. Called Central Asia's 'democracy lab'.

mainIndustries.zh: 黄金开采（库姆托金矿）、水电、农牧业
mainIndustries.en: Gold mining (Kumtor), hydropower, agriculture and livestock

economicSystem.zh: 中亚最开放的经济体。WTO成员（1998年加入）。高度依赖外国援助。
economicSystem.en: Most open economy in Central Asia. WTO member (joined 1998). Highly dependent on foreign aid.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 严重依赖国际援助与贷款。
fiscalPolicy.en: Heavily dependent on international aid and loans.

description.zh: 中亚最小规模军队之一。
description.en: One of Central Asia's smallest militaries.

description.zh: 边防与国内安全。
description.en: Border and domestic security.

threats.zh: 费尔干纳盆地族群紧张、1999年IMU武装分子入侵巴特肯。
threats.en: Fergana Valley ethnic tensions, 1999 IMU militants invasion of Batken.

populationDescription.zh: 人口约490万。吉尔吉斯族约65%、俄罗斯族约13%、乌兹别克族约14%。

ethnicGroups.zh: 吉尔吉斯族（约65%）、乌兹别克族（约14%）、俄罗斯族（约13%）等。

allies.zh: 俄罗斯（安全合作/军事基地）、中国（经贸）、美国（援助与反恐合作）。
allies.en: Russia (security/military base), China (trade), US (aid and counter-terrorism cooperation).

enemies.zh: 无正式敌国。费尔干纳盆地族群紧张。
enemies.en: No formal enemies. Fergana Valley ethnic tensions.

foreignPolicy.zh: 在俄中美之间平衡的多向外交。中亚最亲西方的国家。
foreignPolicy.en: Multi-vector diplomacy balancing Russia, China, and the US. Most pro-Western Central Asian country.

keyInnovations.zh: 水电技术、库姆托金矿（加拿大合资）。
keyInnovations.en: Hydropower technology, Kumtor gold mine (Canadian JV).

strengths.zh: 中亚最开放社会与经济、水电资源、WTO成员。
strengths.en: Most open society and economy in Central Asia, hydropower resources, WTO member.

weaknesses.zh: 极度贫困、政治脆弱、南北分裂、外援依赖。
weaknesses.en: Extreme poverty, political fragility, north-south divide, aid dependence.

outlook.zh: 政治不稳定是最大风险，但公民社会活力为长远发展提供可能。
outlook.en: Political instability as biggest risk, but civil society vitality offers long-term potential.

description.zh: 2000年的吉尔吉斯斯坦在阿卡耶夫总统领导下被称为中亚「民主之岛」，但民主化正在退步。作为中亚最贫困和最开放的国家，经济依赖库姆托金矿和外国援助。1999年乌兹别克斯坦伊斯兰运动（IMU）武装入侵巴特肯地区暴露了安全脆弱性。钦吉斯·艾特马托夫的文学成就和《玛纳斯》史诗代表了深厚的文化传统。
description.en: Kyrgyzstan in 2000 under President Akayev was called Central Asia's 'island of democracy', but democratization was backsliding. As Central Asia's poorest and most open country, the economy depended on Kumtor gold mine and foreign aid. The 1999 IMU armed invasion of Batken exposed security vulnerabilities. Chingiz Aitmatov's literary achievements and the Manas epic represented deep cultural traditions.

dynasty.zh: 拉赫莫诺夫（后改名拉赫蒙）统治

governmentForm.zh: 总统制共和国。1997年内战结束后，拉赫莫诺夫巩固权力。前反对派部分整合入政府。
governmentForm.en: Presidential republic. After 1997 civil war end, Rakhmonov consolidated power. Some former opposition integrated into government.

socialStructure.zh: 内战（1992-1997）创伤深远，库利亚布派掌权，北方列宁纳巴德派和伊斯兰反对派被边缘化。
socialStructure.en: Civil war (1992-1997) left deep scars, Kulyab faction in power, northern Leninabad and Islamic opposition marginalized.

rulingClass.zh: 拉赫莫诺夫与库利亚布派系、安全机构、内战军阀转型精英。
rulingClass.en: Rakhmonov and Kulyab faction, security apparatus, warlord-turned-elites from civil war.

succession.zh: 拉赫莫诺夫巩固权力中，无继承安排。
succession.en: Rakhmonov consolidating power, no succession arrangements.

structure.zh: 强总统制。安全机构权力庞大。1997年和平协议框架下部分反对派参与政府。
structure.en: Strong presidency. Powerful security apparatus. Some opposition participation under 1997 peace agreement.

function.zh: 国家决策核心。
function.en: Core of state decisions.

localAdmin.zh: 4个州（含戈尔诺-巴达赫尚自治州）。中央对山区控制力有限。
localAdmin.en: 4 regions (including Gorno-Badakhshan). Limited central control over mountainous areas.

legalSystem.zh: 苏联遗产法律体系，内战后重建中。
legalSystem.en: Soviet-legacy legal system, rebuilding after civil war.

taxationSystem.zh: 税基极窄，依赖铝业收入和外国援助。
taxationSystem.en: Extremely narrow tax base, dependent on aluminum revenue and foreign aid.

religion.zh: 逊尼派伊斯兰教为主。帕米尔地区有伊斯玛仪派。1997年和平协议后伊斯兰复兴党合法化。
religion.en: Sunni Islam predominant. Ismaili in Pamir. Islamic Renaissance Party legalized after 1997 peace agreement.

philosophy.zh: 波斯文化传统。塔吉克人以萨曼王朝、鲁达基、伊本·西那为文化骄傲。内战后民族和解进程中。
philosophy.en: Persian cultural tradition. Tajiks take pride in Samanid dynasty, Rudaki, Ibn Sina. Post-civil war national reconciliation underway.

culturalAchievements.zh: 波斯文学传统、帕米尔高原遗产。
culturalAchievements.en: Persian literary tradition, Pamir Plateau heritage.

languageFamily.zh: 塔吉克语（波斯语变体），俄语广泛使用。

gdpDescription.zh: 中亚最贫困国家。内战摧毁了经济基础。依赖铝业（TALCO）、棉花和海外劳工汇款。
gdpDescription.en: Central Asia's poorest country. Civil war destroyed economic base. Dependent on aluminum (TALCO), cotton, and overseas worker remittances.

mainIndustries.zh: 铝冶炼（TALCO）、水电、棉花

name.zh: 塔吉克卢布/索莫尼（2000年转换中）

economicSystem.zh: 战后重建经济，高度依赖外国援助与劳工汇款。
economicSystem.en: Post-war reconstruction economy, highly dependent on foreign aid and remittances.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 战后重建依赖国际援助。
fiscalPolicy.en: Post-war reconstruction dependent on international aid.

description.zh: 内战后重组。苏联装备。俄罗斯第201摩步师驻扎。
description.en: Reorganized after civil war. Soviet equipment. Russian 201st Division stationed.

description.zh: 阿富汗边境防御（俄罗斯边防军协助）。
description.en: Afghan border defense (Russian border guards assisting).

threats.zh: 阿富汗塔利班外溢、毒品走私、内战后前军阀势力、帕米尔地区不稳定。
threats.en: Afghan Taliban spillover, narcotics trafficking, post-civil war warlord factions, Pamir instability.

populationDescription.zh: 人口约620万。塔吉克族约80%。内战造成约10万人死亡、数十万难民。
populationDescription.en: Population ~6.2M. Tajiks ~80%. Civil war caused ~100,000 deaths, hundreds of thousands displaced.

ethnicGroups.zh: 塔吉克族（约80%）、乌兹别克族（约15%）等。

allies.zh: 俄罗斯（安全保障国/第201摩步师驻扎/边防军协助）、伊朗（文化与语言纽带）。
allies.en: Russia (security guarantor/201st Division/border guard assistance), Iran (cultural and linguistic ties).

enemies.zh: 阿富汗塔利班（边境安全威胁）。

foreignPolicy.zh: 高度依赖俄罗斯安全保障。与伊朗维持文化联系。
foreignPolicy.en: Highly dependent on Russian security guarantee. Cultural ties with Iran.

keyInnovations.zh: 水电技术（努列克大坝——当时世界最高大坝）。
keyInnovations.en: Hydropower (Nurek Dam — then world's tallest dam).

strengths.zh: 水电资源潜力巨大、年轻人口、波斯文化遗产。
strengths.en: Enormous hydropower potential, young population, Persian cultural heritage.

weaknesses.zh: 内战创伤、极度贫困、阿富汗边境威胁、军阀势力残余。
weaknesses.en: Civil war scars, extreme poverty, Afghan border threats, residual warlord factions.

outlook.zh: 内战后和平脆弱，经济重建漫长。水电资源是长远希望。
outlook.en: Fragile post-civil war peace, long economic reconstruction. Hydropower as long-term hope.

description.zh: 2000年的塔吉克斯坦刚从毁灭性的内战（1992-1997年，约10万人死亡）中恢复。拉赫莫诺夫总统在1997年和平协议框架下与伊斯兰反对派达成权力分享安排，但实际权力向其集中。作为前苏联最贫困的加盟共和国，经济在内战后几乎从废墟中重建，依赖铝业出口和海外劳工汇款。俄罗斯第201摩步师驻扎杜尚别，俄罗斯边防军协助守卫与阿富汗的漫长边境。
description.en: Tajikistan in 2000 was just recovering from a devastating civil war (1992-1997, ~100,000 killed). President Rakhmonov reached a power-sharing arrangement with Islamic opposition under the 1997 peace agreement, but power was concentrating toward him. As the poorest former Soviet republic, the economy was rebuilding from ruins, dependent on aluminum exports and overseas worker remittances. Russia's 201st Division was stationed in Dushanbe, with Russian border guards helping defend the long Afghan border.

description.zh: 2000年的法国是欧盟核心推动力量，希拉克总统领导下积极推进欧洲一体化与独立外交路线。
description.en: France in 2000 was a core EU driving force, actively advancing European integration and independent diplomacy under President Chirac.

governmentForm.zh: 半总统制共和国
governmentForm.en: Semi-presidential republic

socialStructure.zh: 高度城市化的后工业社会，中产阶级为主体
socialStructure.en: Highly urbanized post-industrial society, middle class dominant

rulingClass.zh: 民选政治精英、国家高级官僚（ENA）、产业与金融领袖
rulingClass.en: Elected politicians, senior state bureaucracy (ENA), industrial and financial leaders

succession.zh: 总统直选（七年任期，2002年改为五年）+ 议会选举
succession.en: Direct presidential election (7-year term, changed to 5 in 2002) + parliamentary elections

structure.zh: 总统/总理/国民议会/参议院/宪法委员会
structure.en: President / PM / National Assembly / Senate / Constitutional Council

function.zh: 警务、治安、地方行政
function.en: Policing, public order, local administration

function.zh: 军事防务与核威慑
function.en: Military defense and nuclear deterrent

function.zh: 财政、税收、经济政策
function.en: Finance, taxation, economic policy

function.zh: 外交关系、法语非洲、欧盟事务
function.en: Foreign relations, Francophone Africa, EU affairs

function.zh: 公立教育体系管理
function.en: Public education system management

localAdmin.zh: 大区-省-市镇三级行政，中央集权传统

legalSystem.zh: 大陆法系，拿破仑法典传统，宪法委员会违宪审查
legalSystem.en: Civil law, Napoleonic tradition, Constitutional Council review

taxationSystem.zh: 增值税、所得税、社会保险缴款、企业税
taxationSystem.en: VAT, income tax, social security contributions, corporate tax

religion.zh: 天主教传统，政教分离（laïcité）原则

philosophy.zh: 启蒙理性主义、共和主义、人权宣言传统
philosophy.en: Enlightenment rationalism, republicanism, Declaration of Rights tradition

culturalAchievements.zh: 文学、哲学、电影、时尚、美食在全球影响深远
culturalAchievements.en: Global influence in literature, philosophy, cinema, fashion, gastronomy

languageFamily.zh: 印欧语系罗曼语族

gdpDescription.zh: 2000年法国GDP约1.33万亿美元，世界第五大经济体，工业、服务业与农业均发达
gdpDescription.en: France's GDP ~$1.33T in 2000, world's 5th largest economy, with advanced industry, services, and agriculture

mainIndustries.zh: 航空航天、汽车、奢侈品、核能、农业、旅游、金融
mainIndustries.en: Aerospace, automotive, luxury goods, nuclear energy, agriculture, tourism, finance

economicSystem.zh: 国家干预色彩较强的混合市场经济
economicSystem.en: Mixed market economy with significant state intervention

fiscalPolicy.zh: 高税收、高支出的福利国家模式
fiscalPolicy.en: High-tax, high-spending welfare state model

technology.zh: 核武器（潜射+空基）、阵风战斗机、航母戴高乐号
technology.en: Nuclear weapons (SLBM + air-based), Rafale fighters, carrier Charles de Gaulle

allies.zh: 欧盟成员国、北约成员国、美国、法语非洲国家
allies.en: EU members, NATO members, US, Francophone African countries

foreignPolicy.zh: 欧洲一体化核心推动者、法语非洲影响力、独立外交传统
foreignPolicy.en: Core EU integration driver, Francophone African influence, independent diplomatic tradition

keyInnovations.zh: 空客航空航天、核能技术、TGV高速铁路、阿丽亚娜火箭
keyInnovations.en: Airbus aerospace, nuclear technology, TGV, Ariane rockets

strengths.zh: 独立核威慑、航空航天工业、文化软实力、欧盟核心地位
strengths.en: Independent nuclear deterrent, aerospace, cultural soft power, core EU status

weaknesses.zh: 劳动力市场僵化、社会矛盾、财政赤字
weaknesses.en: Labor market rigidity, social tensions, fiscal deficits

outlook.zh: 欧元启动将进一步深化法国在欧洲经济中的核心作用
outlook.en: Euro launch will further deepen France's core role in European economy

ideology.zh: 社会民主主义

relationship.zh: 在左翼共治格局下掌控政府，与总统希拉克的共治关系既是合作又存在权力博弈。社会党主导立法与内政议程，推行35小时工作制等标志性改革。
relationship.en: Controlled the government under cohabitation, sharing power with President Chirac in a relationship of cooperation and rivalry. The Socialists set the legislative and domestic agenda, implementing landmark reforms such as the 35-hour work week.

description.zh: 法国社会党是法国主要左翼政党，1969年由旧工人国际法国支部改组而成。在若斯潘领导下推行社会民主改革，标志性政策包括35小时工作周。2000年时社会党掌握国民议会多数并主导政府，但需与右翼总统希拉克共处共治框架。党的基层支持主要来自工会、公务员和城市知识阶层。
description.en: The French Socialist Party was the main left-wing party, reorganized in 1969 from the old SFIO. Under Jospin it pursued social-democratic reforms, notably the 35-hour work week. In 2000 the party held a National Assembly majority and led the government but had to coexist with right-wing President Chirac under cohabitation. Its grassroots support came from unions, civil servants, and urban intellectuals.

role.zh: 政府首脑，推行35小时工作制与就业政策
role.en: Head of government, implementing the 35-hour work week and employment policy

role.zh: 35小时工作制法案主要推动者
role.en: Chief architect of the 35-hour work week legislation

ideology.zh: 戴高乐主义

relationship.zh: 希拉克以总统身份掌握外交与国防主导权，但在共治体制下被迫与左翼政府分享权力。RPR与社会党之间的紧张关系贯穿整个共治时期，双方在经济政策和欧洲事务上分歧明显。
relationship.en: Chirac wielded presidential authority over foreign affairs and defense but was forced to share power with the left-wing government under cohabitation. Tensions between the RPR and the Socialists pervaded the entire period, with clear disagreements on economic policy and European affairs.

description.zh: 保卫共和联盟是法国主要右翼政党，继承戴高乐主义传统，1976年由希拉克创立。2000年时希拉克虽为总统但因议会失利而处于共治困境，党在地方层面仍有强大基础。RPR正酝酿与法国民主联盟合并组建更大的右翼政党联盟（后来的人民运动联盟UMP）。党的支持基础主要是保守中产阶级、企业界和农村选民。
description.en: The RPR was France's main right-wing party, heir to the Gaullist tradition, founded by Chirac in 1976. In 2000 Chirac was president but trapped in cohabitation after losing parliamentary elections. The RPR retained a strong local base and was preparing a merger with the UDF to form a broader right-wing alliance (later the UMP). Its support base was mainly conservative middle classes, business circles, and rural voters.

role.zh: 国家元首，主导外交与国防政策
role.en: Head of state, leading foreign affairs and defense policy

role.zh: 党务领导与组织协调
role.en: Party leadership and organizational coordination

ideology.zh: 极右翼民族主义

relationship.zh: 国民阵线被主流左右翼政党共同排斥，处于'共和阵线'封锁之外。尽管无法进入执政联盟，但其在移民、安全和欧洲一体化议题上的立场对选举格局产生持续冲击。
relationship.en: The National Front was shunned by both mainstream left and right parties through the 'republican front' cordon. Though excluded from governing coalitions, its positions on immigration, security, and European integration continually disrupted the electoral landscape.

description.zh: 国民阵线由让-马里·勒庞于1972年创立，是法国极右翼代表性政党。主张强硬反移民、反欧盟一体化和法国优先政策。2000年时虽无议会实权但选举影响力不断上升，已在地方选举中取得突破。勒庞的煽动性言论和争议立场使其成为法国政治中最具争议性的人物之一。该党正为2002年总统大选蓄力，将震惊法国政坛。
description.en: The National Front was founded by Jean-Marie Le Pen in 1972 as France's flagship far-right party. It advocated hardline anti-immigration, anti-EU integration, and France-first policies. In 2000 it held no real parliamentary power but its electoral influence was rising steadily, having achieved breakthroughs in local elections. Le Pen's inflammatory rhetoric and controversial positions made him one of the most polarizing figures in French politics. The party was building momentum for the 2002 presidential election, which would shock the French political establishment.

role.zh: 创党领袖与极右翼运动核心人物
role.en: Founding leader and central figure of the far-right movement

role.zh: 1999年分裂后另立门户，削弱了国民阵线内部团结
role.en: Split in 1999 to form a rival party, weakening FN internal unity

description.zh: 2000年的德国是欧洲最大经济体，统一十年后正在推进结构改革与欧洲一体化。
description.en: Germany in 2000 was Europe's largest economy, pursuing structural reforms and European integration a decade after reunification.

governmentForm.zh: 议会制联邦共和国
governmentForm.en: Parliamentary federal republic

socialStructure.zh: 统一后东西差距仍存的工业化社会
socialStructure.en: Industrialized society with persisting East-West divide after reunification

rulingClass.zh: 政党政治精英、产业资本集团、工会领袖、联邦州长
rulingClass.en: Party politicians, industrial groups, union leaders, state premiers

succession.zh: 联邦议院选举产生总理
succession.en: Chancellor elected by Bundestag

structure.zh: 联邦总统/联邦总理/联邦议院/联邦参议院/联邦宪法法院
structure.en: President / Chancellor / Bundestag / Bundesrat / Federal Constitutional Court

function.zh: 税收与预算
function.en: Taxation and budget

function.zh: 军事防务
function.en: Military defense

function.zh: 外交政策与欧盟事务
function.en: Foreign policy and EU affairs

function.zh: 内务与安全
function.en: Internal affairs and security

localAdmin.zh: 16个联邦州拥有广泛立法与行政权
localAdmin.en: 16 Länder with extensive legislative and executive authority

legalSystem.zh: 大陆法系，联邦宪法法院拥有强大的违宪审查权
legalSystem.en: Civil law, Federal Constitutional Court with strong judicial review

taxationSystem.zh: 所得税、增值税、团结附加税、教会税、社会保险
taxationSystem.en: Income tax, VAT, solidarity surcharge, church tax, social insurance

philosophy.zh: 康德与黑格尔传统、社会市场经济理念
philosophy.en: Kantian and Hegelian tradition, social market economy philosophy

culturalAchievements.zh: 古典音乐、哲学、工程学、柏林文化复兴
culturalAchievements.en: Classical music, philosophy, engineering, Berlin cultural renaissance

languageFamily.zh: 印欧语系日耳曼语族

gdpDescription.zh: 欧洲最大、世界第三大经济体，出口导向型工业强国，统一后东部重建仍在进行
gdpDescription.en: Europe's largest, world's 3rd largest economy, export-oriented industrial powerhouse, eastern reconstruction ongoing

mainIndustries.zh: 汽车制造、机械工程、化工、电子、钢铁、金融
mainIndustries.en: Automotive, mechanical engineering, chemicals, electronics, steel, finance

economicSystem.zh: 社会市场经济（Soziale Marktwirtschaft）
economicSystem.en: Social market economy (Soziale Marktwirtschaft)

fiscalPolicy.zh: 统一成本仍在消化，推进预算整顿
fiscalPolicy.en: Still absorbing reunification costs, pursuing budget consolidation

technology.zh: 北约标准化装备，豹2坦克、台风战斗机

allies.zh: 北约成员国、欧盟成员国、美国、法国（欧洲核心伙伴）
allies.en: NATO, EU, US, France (core European partner)

foreignPolicy.zh: 多边主义、欧洲一体化核心推动者、大西洋合作
foreignPolicy.en: Multilateralism, core EU integration driver, Atlantic cooperation

keyInnovations.zh: 汽车工程、精密机械、化工技术、SAP企业软件
keyInnovations.en: Automotive engineering, precision machinery, chemical technology, SAP enterprise software

strengths.zh: 世界级制造业与出口、强大工程基础、欧盟核心地位
strengths.en: World-class manufacturing/exports, strong engineering base, core EU status

weaknesses.zh: 东部重建负担、劳动力市场僵化、人口老龄化
weaknesses.en: Eastern reconstruction burden, labor market rigidity, aging population

outlook.zh: 施罗德改革有望释放经济活力，欧元启动将深化德国的欧洲经济领导力
outlook.en: Schröder reforms may unleash economic vitality, euro launch will deepen Germany's European economic leadership

ideology.zh: 社会民主主义、第三条道路

relationship.zh: 与绿党组成红绿联盟执政，施罗德推行'新中间'路线，主导德国政治现代化改革。
relationship.en: Leads the red-green coalition with the Greens; Schröder pursues the 'Neue Mitte' (New Centre) reform agenda.

description.zh: 德国社会民主党是欧洲历史最悠久的社会民主政党之一。1998年施罗德带领社民党击败科尔领导的基民盟，结束其十六年执政，与绿党组成红绿联盟。2000年施罗德政府推行'新中间'路线，在经济政策上趋向市场化改革，同时维持福利国家框架。社民党在科索沃战争后积极参与北约行动，标志着德国外交政策的重大转变。
description.en: The SPD is one of Europe's oldest social democratic parties. In 1998, Schröder led the SPD to victory over Helmut Kohl's CDU, ending 16 years of conservative rule, and formed a red-green coalition with the Greens. By 2000, Schröder was pursuing his 'Neue Mitte' agenda, blending market-oriented reforms with the preservation of Germany's welfare state. The SPD government marked a significant shift in German foreign policy by participating in NATO's Kosovo intervention.

name.zh: 基督教民主联盟/基督教社会联盟
name.en: Christian Democratic Union / Christian Social Union

ideology.zh: 基督教民主主义、保守主义、社会市场经济
ideology.en: Christian democracy, conservatism, social market economy

relationship.zh: 科尔政治献金丑闻后陷入严重危机，默克尔于2000年就任党主席，开始重建党的形象。
relationship.en: Engulfed in crisis after the Kohl donation scandal; Merkel became party chair in 2000 and began rebuilding the party's image.

description.zh: 基民盟/基社盟是德国最大的中右翼政党联盟。1998年联邦大选失利后，前总理科尔又于1999年底爆出政治献金丑闻，令党陷入严重信誉危机。2000年4月安格拉·默克尔当选基民盟主席，成为该党首位女性领导人。默克尔果断与科尔时代切割，推动党内改革与年轻化，开始漫长的政党重建之路。
description.en: The CDU/CSU is Germany's largest centre-right political alliance. After losing the 1998 election, the party was thrown into crisis when Helmut Kohl's secret donation scandal erupted in late 1999. In April 2000, Angela Merkel was elected CDU chairwoman, becoming the first woman to lead the party. She decisively broke with the Kohl era, driving internal reforms and generational renewal.

ideology.zh: 绿色政治、和平主义、社会自由主义

relationship.zh: 作为红绿联盟的执政小伙伴，菲舍尔出任外长，绿党首次进入联邦政府核心。
relationship.en: Junior coalition partner in the red-green government; Fischer serves as Foreign Minister in the Greens' first time in federal government.

description.zh: 联盟90/绿党由西德绿党运动与东德民权组织联盟90于1993年合并而成。1998年首次作为执政联盟伙伴进入联邦政府，菲舍尔出任外交部长兼副总理。2000年绿党推动了德国核电退出计划和可再生能源法案等里程碑式立法。然而支持北约科索沃军事行动在党内引发严重分歧。
description.en: Alliance 90/The Greens was formed in 1993 from the merger of the West German Green Party and the East German Alliance 90 civil rights movement. In 1998, the Greens entered federal government for the first time, with Joschka Fischer serving as Foreign Minister. By 2000, the party championed landmark legislation including the nuclear phase-out plan and the Renewable Energy Act.

description.zh: 2000年的英国在布莱尔新工党领导下经历经济繁荣，积极参与国际事务但在欧洲一体化问题上态度谨慎。
description.en: The UK in 2000 enjoyed economic prosperity under Blair's New Labour, actively engaged in international affairs but cautious on European integration.

name.zh: 大不列颠及北爱尔兰联合王国
name.en: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

dynasty.zh: 温莎王朝 / 伊丽莎白二世时代
dynasty.en: House of Windsor / Elizabeth II era

governmentForm.zh: 议会制君主立宪制
governmentForm.en: Parliamentary constitutional monarchy

socialStructure.zh: 后工业多元社会，阶级体系松动但仍存
socialStructure.en: Post-industrial diverse society, class system loosening but persisting

rulingClass.zh: 议会政治精英、金融城、媒体与文化产业领袖
rulingClass.en: Parliamentary politicians, the City, media and cultural industry leaders

succession.zh: 议会选举首相，王位世袭
succession.en: PM from parliament, hereditary monarchy

structure.zh: 女王/首相/下议院/上议院/最高法院（大法官委员会）
structure.en: Queen / PM / House of Commons / House of Lords / Lord Chancellor

function.zh: 财政政策与预算
function.en: Fiscal policy and budget

function.zh: 军事防务
function.en: Military defense

function.zh: 外交与英联邦事务
function.en: Foreign and Commonwealth affairs

function.zh: 内务、移民、治安
function.en: Internal affairs, immigration, public order

localAdmin.zh: 英格兰地方议会、苏格兰议会（1999年建立）、威尔士议会、北爱尔兰议会
localAdmin.en: English local councils, Scottish Parliament (est. 1999), Welsh Assembly, Northern Ireland Assembly

legalSystem.zh: 普通法系，议会主权原则

taxationSystem.zh: 所得税、增值税、国民保险、资本利得税、公司税
taxationSystem.en: Income tax, VAT, National Insurance, capital gains tax, corporation tax

religion.zh: 英国国教传统，多元信仰并存

philosophy.zh: 经验主义、自由主义、功利主义传统
philosophy.en: Empiricist, liberal, utilitarian tradition

culturalAchievements.zh: 英语文学、戏剧、流行音乐、BBC广播的全球影响
culturalAchievements.en: Global influence in English literature, theatre, pop music, BBC broadcasting

languageFamily.zh: 印欧语系日耳曼语族

gdpDescription.zh: 世界第四大经济体，金融服务业全球领先，布莱尔时代经济繁荣
gdpDescription.en: World's 4th largest economy, global leader in financial services, Blair-era prosperity

mainIndustries.zh: 金融服务、北海石油、制药、航空航天、创意产业、高等教育
mainIndustries.en: Financial services, North Sea oil, pharmaceuticals, aerospace, creative industries, higher education

economicSystem.zh: 自由市场经济，撒切尔改革遗产与新工党修正
economicSystem.en: Liberal market economy, Thatcher reform legacy with New Labour adjustments

fiscalPolicy.zh: 戈登·布朗的"金色规则"与审慎财政
fiscalPolicy.en: Gordon Brown's 'Golden Rule' and prudent fiscal policy

technology.zh: 核武器（三叉戟）、挑战者坦克、鹞式/台风战斗机、航母
technology.en: Nuclear weapons (Trident), Challenger tanks, Harrier/Typhoon, carriers

allies.zh: 美国（特殊关系）、北约成员国、英联邦国家、欧盟成员国
allies.en: US (Special Relationship), NATO, Commonwealth, EU members

foreignPolicy.zh: 大西洋主义与欧洲参与并行，积极干预主义（科索沃、塞拉利昂）
foreignPolicy.en: Atlanticism with European engagement, active interventionism (Kosovo, Sierra Leone)

keyInnovations.zh: 金融科技、制药、航空发动机（罗尔斯罗伊斯）、ARM芯片架构
keyInnovations.en: Fintech, pharmaceuticals, aero engines (Rolls-Royce), ARM chip architecture

strengths.zh: 金融中心地位、英语优势、强大军事力量、文化软实力
strengths.en: Financial center status, English language advantage, strong military, cultural soft power

weaknesses.zh: 对欧洲一体化态度分裂、制造业衰退、南北差距
weaknesses.en: Divided on European integration, manufacturing decline, North-South divide

outlook.zh: 布莱尔新工党的"第三条道路"使英国在全球舞台上影响力上升
outlook.en: Blair's New Labour 'Third Way' is raising UK influence on the global stage

ideology.zh: 第三条道路、现代化改革、亲欧、公共服务投资、伊拉克干预
ideology.en: Third Way, modernization, pro-EU, public service investment, Iraq intervention

relationship.zh: 布莱尔领导的新工党自1997年以压倒性优势赢得大选后执政至今，在英国政坛占据主导地位。布莱尔推行“第三条道路”政策，试图在传统社会民主与市场经济之间寻求平衡，同时积极推进英国在欧盟和国际事务中的角色。新工党与保守党的竞争构成英国两党政治的主要轴线。
relationship.en: Blair's New Labour dominated British politics after its landslide 1997 election victory. Blair pursued 'Third Way' policies seeking balance between traditional social democracy and market economics, while actively promoting Britain's role in the EU and international affairs. The competition between New Labour and the Conservatives formed the main axis of British two-party politics.

description.zh: 工党成立于1900年，长期代表英国工人阶级和工会运动的利益。1994年托尼·布莱尔当选党魁后，大刀阔斧地进行现代化改革，废除了党章第四条关于公有制的承诺，将工党重塑为“新工党”。1997年大选中新工党赢得历史性的179席多数，结束了保守党18年执政。布莱尔政府推行宪政改革（苏格兰和威尔士权力下放、上议院改革）、公共服务投资、最低工资制度，并在外交上深度参与科索沃干预和北约行动。到2000年，新工党仍处于执政巅峰，但伊拉克问题和布莱尔日益增长的总统式作风已开始引发党内不满。
description.en: The Labour Party was founded in 1900 to represent British working-class and trade union interests. After Tony Blair became leader in 1994, he dramatically modernized the party, abolishing Clause IV's commitment to public ownership and rebranding it as 'New Labour.' In the 1997 election New Labour won a historic 179-seat majority, ending 18 years of Conservative rule. The Blair government pursued constitutional reform (Scottish and Welsh devolution, House of Lords reform), public service investment, the minimum wage, and deep involvement in Kosovo and NATO operations. By 2000 New Labour was still at its governing peak, but Iraq and Blair's increasingly presidential style were beginning to generate internal dissent.

role.zh: 新工党核心领袖，第三条道路倡导者
role.en: Core New Labour leader, Third Way advocate

role.zh: 经济政策主导者，布莱尔的主要内部竞争者
role.en: Dominant economic policymaker, Blair's main internal rival

role.zh: 工党传统派代表，联系工会基础
role.en: Representative of traditional Labour, linking to the union base

leaderTitle.en: Party Leader / Leader of the Opposition

ideology.zh: 欧洲怀疑主义、传统价值观、自由市场、减税
ideology.en: Euroscepticism, traditional values, free market, tax reduction

relationship.zh: 保守党在1997年遭受惨败后处于重建期，年轻的威廉·黑格试图重塑党的形象但收效甚微。该党在欧洲一体化问题上持怀疑态度，反对英国加入欧元区，但在国内政策上难以与声望正盛的布莱尔政府抗衡。保守党内部在欧洲问题上的分裂仍然是其最大的结构性弱点。
relationship.en: The Conservative Party was in a rebuilding phase after its 1997 catastrophic defeat. The young William Hague attempted to rebrand the party with limited success. The party was Eurosceptic, opposing Britain's adoption of the euro, but struggled to compete domestically against the popular Blair government. Internal divisions over Europe remained its biggest structural weakness.

description.zh: 保守党（又称托利党）历史可追溯至1834年，是英国最古老的政党之一。1979至1997年间，撒切尔和梅杰领导保守党执政18年，推行私有化、减税和大西洋主义外交。1997年大选中保守党遭遇灾难性失败，仅获165席。威廉·黑格在1997年接任党魁时年仅36岁，成为保守党百年来最年轻的领袖。他试图以欧洲怀疑主义和“常识保守主义”重新定义该党，但面对布莱尔新工党的强势执政，保守党支持率持续低迷。到2000年，保守党仍在寻找回归执政之路，欧洲问题和现代化之争持续困扰着党内团结。
description.en: The Conservative Party (also known as the Tories) traces its history to 1834 and is one of Britain's oldest parties. From 1979 to 1997, Thatcher and Major led 18 years of Conservative government, pursuing privatization, tax cuts, and Atlanticist foreign policy. The 1997 election was a catastrophe, reducing the party to just 165 seats. William Hague took over as leader at age 36, becoming the youngest Conservative leader in over a century. He tried to redefine the party through Euroscepticism and 'common sense conservatism,' but faced with Blair's dominant New Labour, Conservative support remained depressed. By 2000 the party was still searching for a path back to power, with Europe and modernization debates continuing to trouble party unity.

role.zh: 反对党领袖，试图重建保守党
role.en: Opposition leader, attempting to rebuild the Conservatives

role.zh: 保守党现代化派代表人物
role.en: Leading Conservative modernizer

role.zh: 保守党传统右翼代表
role.en: Representative of the traditional Conservative right

ideology.zh: 亲欧、公民自由、社会自由主义、联邦制
ideology.en: Pro-EU, civil liberties, social liberalism, federalism

relationship.zh: 自由民主党是英国第三大政党，在两党主导的政治体系中扮演制衡角色。该党在欧洲一体化问题上最为积极，主张公民自由和选举改革。1999年查尔斯·肯尼迪接任党魁后，自民党在地方选举和部分选区中保持稳定表现，尤其在苏格兰和英格兰西南部。
relationship.en: The Liberal Democrats were Britain's third party, playing a balancing role in the two-party-dominated system. They were the most pro-European integration party and championed civil liberties and electoral reform. After Charles Kennedy became leader in 1999, the party maintained steady performance in local elections and certain constituencies, particularly in Scotland and southwest England.

description.zh: 自由民主党成立于1988年，由自由党和社会民主党合并而成，继承了英国自由主义的悠久传统。该党在英国下议院中通常拥有40至50席，虽然无法与工党和保守党的规模竞争，但在特定地区（如西南英格兰、苏格兰高地、大学城）拥有稳固基础。查尔斯·肯尼迪以其亲和力和反战立场（尤其在日后的伊拉克战争中）赢得了广泛好感。自民党是英国政坛中最支持欧洲一体化的主要政党，主张英国加入欧元区和深化与欧盟的合作，同时在国内倡导比例代表制选举改革和更强的公民权利保护。
description.en: The Liberal Democrats were formed in 1988 from a merger of the Liberal Party and the Social Democratic Party, inheriting Britain's long liberal tradition. The party typically held 40 to 50 Commons seats and, while unable to match Labour or Conservative scale, had solid bases in specific areas (southwest England, Scottish Highlands, university towns). Charles Kennedy won broad goodwill with his affability and anti-war stance (especially during the later Iraq War). The Lib Dems were the most pro-European integration major party in British politics, advocating euro adoption and deeper EU cooperation, while domestically championing proportional representation and stronger civil rights protections.

role.zh: 1999年当选党魁，以亲和风格著称
role.en: Elected leader in 1999, known for his approachable style

role.zh: 自民党现代化奠基人
role.en: Architect of Liberal Democrat modernization

description.zh: 2000年的荷兰是高度开放的贸易国家，欧盟创始成员，鹿特丹港为欧洲门户。
description.en: The Netherlands in 2000 was a highly open trading nation, EU founding member, with Rotterdam as Europe's gateway port.

governmentForm.zh: 议会制君主立宪制
governmentForm.en: Parliamentary constitutional monarchy

socialStructure.zh: 共识政治（polder model）下的富裕贸易社会
socialStructure.en: Affluent trading society under consensus politics (polder model)

rulingClass.zh: 联合政府政治家、贸易与金融精英
rulingClass.en: Coalition politicians, trade and financial elite

succession.zh: 议会选举组阁
succession.en: Parliamentary coalition formation

structure.zh: 女王/首相/二院制议会
structure.en: Queen / PM / Bicameral Parliament

taxationSystem.zh: 所得税、增值税、企业税
taxationSystem.en: Income tax, VAT, corporate tax

religion.zh: 新教与天主教并存，世俗化

philosophy.zh: 自由主义、包容传统
philosophy.en: Liberalism, tolerance tradition

culturalAchievements.zh: 黄金时代绘画传统、设计创新
culturalAchievements.en: Golden Age painting tradition, design innovation

languageFamily.zh: 印欧语系日耳曼语族

gdpDescription.zh: 高度开放的贸易经济体，鹿特丹港为欧洲最大港口
gdpDescription.en: Highly open trading economy, Rotterdam as Europe's largest port

mainIndustries.zh: 石油化工、食品加工、电子、物流贸易、金融
mainIndustries.en: Petrochemicals, food processing, electronics, logistics, finance

economicSystem.zh: 开放市场经济
