relationship.zh: 执政党，在2000年大选中以微弱优势赢得连任。
relationship.en: Ruling party, narrowly winning re-election in the 2000 general election.

description.zh: 泛希腊社会主义运动在科斯塔斯·西米蒂斯领导下于2000年4月大选中以微弱优势赢得连任。西米蒂斯的核心施政目标是使希腊达到加入欧元区的标准。2001年希腊成功加入欧元区，被视为标志性成就。然而后来曝光的财政数据造假问题为日后的债务危机埋下了隐患。
description.en: PASOK narrowly won re-election in April 2000 under Costas Simitis, whose central objective was qualifying Greece for eurozone membership through fiscal consolidation and reform. Greece successfully joined the eurozone in 2001, though later revelations of fiscal data manipulation planted seeds for the eventual debt crisis.

ideology.zh: 保守主义、自由保守主义

relationship.zh: 主要反对党，在2000年大选中以微弱差距落败。
relationship.en: Main opposition party, narrowly defeated in the 2000 election.

description.zh: 新民主党由康斯坦丁·卡拉曼利斯在1974年军政府倒台后创建。2000年该党由创始人的侄子科斯塔斯·卡拉曼利斯领导，在大选中以不到一个百分点的差距惜败。他最终在2004年大选中带领新民主党重返执政。
description.en: New Democracy was founded by Constantine Karamanlis after the fall of the military junta in 1974. In 2000, led by the founder's nephew Costas Karamanlis, ND came agonizingly close, losing by less than one percentage point. Karamanlis would lead ND back to power in 2004.

ideology.zh: 共产主义、马克思列宁主义

relationship.zh: 反对党，对PASOK和新民主党均持批判立场，拒绝与资产阶级政党合作。
relationship.en: Opposition party, critical of both PASOK and New Democracy, refusing cooperation with bourgeois parties.

description.zh: 希腊共产党是欧洲历史最悠久的共产党之一，坚持正统马克思列宁主义路线。该党在二战抵抗运动中的英勇斗争赢得了持久的道德权威。KKE坚决反对欧盟和北约，在2000年大选中获得约5.5%的选票。
description.en: The KKE is one of Europe's oldest communist parties, maintaining an orthodox Marxist-Leninist line. The party's role in the WWII resistance earned it enduring moral authority. KKE staunchly opposed the EU and NATO, winning approximately 5.5% in the 2000 election.

governmentForm.zh: 总统制共和国，孔戴自1984年政变执政。
governmentForm.en: Presidential republic; Conté in power since 1984 coup.

socialStructure.zh: 多民族。
socialStructure.en: Multi-ethnic.

rulingClass.zh: 总统和军方。
rulingClass.en: President and military.

succession.zh: 名义直选。
succession.en: Nominally directly elected.

structure.zh: 总统制。
structure.en: Presidential system.

function.zh: 安全。
function.en: Security.

taxationSystem.zh: 关税和矿业税。
taxationSystem.en: Customs and mining taxes.

culturalAchievements.zh: 丰富的曼丁哥音乐传统。
culturalAchievements.en: Rich Mandinka music tradition.

languageFamily.zh: 尼日尔-刚果/大西洋语系；法语

philosophy.zh: 伊斯兰和传统信仰。
philosophy.en: Islam and traditional beliefs.

gdpDescription.zh: 低收入国家，铝土矿储量全球最大。
gdpDescription.en: Low-income; world's largest bauxite reserves.

mainIndustries.zh: 铝土矿、黄金开采、农业

householdWealth.zh: 极端贫困。
householdWealth.en: Extreme poverty.

economicSystem.zh: 矿业出口型经济。
economicSystem.en: Mining export economy.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 矿业收入依赖。
fiscalPolicy.en: Mining revenue dependent.

description.zh: 装备简陋。
description.en: Poorly equipped.

technology.zh: 轻武器。

threats.zh: 利比里亚和塞拉利昂冲突溢出。
threats.en: Spillover from Liberia and Sierra Leone conflicts.

enemies.zh: 利比里亚和塞拉利昂冲突溢出
enemies.en: Liberia and Sierra Leone conflict spillover

strengths.zh: 巨大的铝土矿储量。
strengths.en: Vast bauxite reserves.

weaknesses.zh: 贫困、腐败、邻国冲突溢出。
weaknesses.en: Poverty, corruption, neighbor conflict spillover.

outlook.zh: 矿业潜力大但治理薄弱。
outlook.en: Mining potential but weak governance.

description.zh: 2000年的几内亚坐拥巨大矿产但深陷贫困。
description.en: Guinea in 2000: sitting on vast minerals but mired in poverty.

governmentForm.zh: 议会制共和国，总理伯蒂·埃亨执政。
governmentForm.en: Parliamentary republic; Taoiseach Bertie Ahern in office.

socialStructure.zh: 较均质社会，凯尔特虎经济带来快速变化。
socialStructure.en: Relatively homogeneous; Celtic Tiger economy bringing rapid change.

rulingClass.zh: 民选政治家、商业精英、社会伙伴。
rulingClass.en: Elected politicians, business elites, social partners.

succession.zh: 总统直选，总理由议会推举。
succession.en: President directly elected; Taoiseach from parliament.

structure.zh: 议会制，两院制议会。
structure.en: Parliamentary; bicameral Oireachtas.

function.zh: 财政。
function.en: Finance.

function.zh: 安全。
function.en: Security.

taxationSystem.zh: 低企业税率吸引外资。
taxationSystem.en: Low corporate tax attracted FDI.

culturalAchievements.zh: 诺贝尔文学奖得主辈出、传统音乐、圣帕特里克节。
culturalAchievements.en: Multiple Nobel laureates; traditional music; St. Patrick's Day.

languageFamily.zh: 印欧语系凯尔特语族（爱尔兰语）和日耳曼语族（英语）

philosophy.zh: 天主教传统与现代自由主义。
philosophy.en: Catholic tradition and modern liberalism.

gdpDescription.zh: 凯尔特虎经济繁荣，欧洲增长最快的经济体。
gdpDescription.en: Celtic Tiger boom; Europe's fastest-growing economy.

mainIndustries.zh: 制药、软件、电子、食品、金融

tradeGoods.zh: 药品、软件、电子设备、食品

householdWealth.zh: 快速增长的家庭财富。
householdWealth.en: Rapidly growing household wealth.

economicSystem.zh: 低税率吸引外资的开放型经济。
economicSystem.en: Open economy attracting FDI with low taxes.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 低税率亲商财政。
fiscalPolicy.en: Low-tax pro-business fiscal policy.

description.zh: 以维和为主。
description.en: Primarily peacekeeping.

description.zh: 小型力量。
description.en: Small forces.

technology.zh: 适度装备。

keyInnovations.zh: 软件和制药中心。
keyInnovations.en: Software and pharmaceutical hub.

infrastructure.zh: 基础设施快速现代化。

allies.zh: 欧盟、美国（爱裔侨民）

foreignPolicy.zh: 军事中立，积极参与联合国维和。
foreignPolicy.en: Militarily neutral; active in UN peacekeeping.

strengths.zh: 低税率、英语国家、年轻人口、教育水平高。
strengths.en: Low taxes, English-speaking, young population, high education.

weaknesses.zh: 住房价格飙升、基建瓶颈、北爱问题。
weaknesses.en: Housing prices soaring; infrastructure bottlenecks; Northern Ireland.

outlook.zh: 凯尔特虎繁荣持续。
outlook.en: Celtic Tiger boom continuing.

description.zh: 2000年的爱尔兰正经历凯尔特虎经济奇迹。
description.en: Ireland in 2000: experiencing the Celtic Tiger economic miracle.

ideology.zh: 共和主义、中间派

relationship.zh: 执政党，与进步民主党组建联合政府。
relationship.en: Ruling party, governing in coalition with the Progressive Democrats.

description.zh: 爱尔兰共和党是爱尔兰历史上最成功的政党，自1997年起由伯蒂·埃亨领导执政。2000年正值凯尔特之虎经济奇迹的鼎盛时期。埃亨还在北爱尔兰和平进程中发挥了关键作用，参与缔结了1998年的《耶稣受难日协议》。
description.en: Fianna Fáil is historically Ireland's most successful party, governing under Bertie Ahern since 1997. The year 2000 represented the height of the Celtic Tiger boom. Ahern also played a pivotal role in the Northern Ireland peace process, helping negotiate the 1998 Good Friday Agreement.

ideology.zh: 自由保守主义、基督教民主主义

relationship.zh: 主要反对党，在凯尔特之虎经济繁荣期间难以有效挑战执政党。
relationship.en: Main opposition party, struggling to challenge the government during the Celtic Tiger boom.

description.zh: 爱尔兰统一党是爱尔兰第二大政党。在约翰·布鲁顿领导下，该党作为主要反对党面临重大挑战——凯尔特之虎经济的空前繁荣使得批评执政的Fianna Fáil政府变得异常困难。
description.en: Fine Gael is Ireland's second-largest party. Under John Bruton, the party faced significant challenges as the main opposition — the unprecedented Celtic Tiger prosperity made it extremely difficult to criticize the governing Fianna Fáil.

ideology.zh: 经济自由主义

relationship.zh: Fianna Fáil的执政联盟伙伴，玛丽·哈尼任副总理。
relationship.en: Coalition partner of Fianna Fáil, with Mary Harney serving as Tánaiste.

description.zh: 进步民主党是爱尔兰的一个经济自由主义小党。哈尼积极推动低税收、放松管制和亲商政策，被认为是凯尔特之虎经济模式的重要推手。该党以其著名表述定位爱尔兰'更接近波士顿而非柏林'。
description.en: The Progressive Democrats were a small economically liberal party. Harney championed low taxation, deregulation, and pro-business policies credited with fueling the Celtic Tiger. The party famously positioned Ireland as 'closer to Boston than Berlin'.

governmentForm.zh: 议会制共和国，总理朱利亚诺·阿马托执政。
governmentForm.en: Parliamentary republic; PM Giuliano Amato in office.

socialStructure.zh: 南北差距显著的发达社会。
socialStructure.en: Developed society with significant north-south divide.

rulingClass.zh: 民选政治家、工业家、工会。
rulingClass.en: Elected politicians, industrialists, unions.

succession.zh: 总统由议会和大区代表选出，总理由总统提名。
succession.en: President by parliament; PM nominated by president.

structure.zh: 议会制，两院制议会。
structure.en: Parliamentary; bicameral parliament.

function.zh: 财政。
function.en: Finance.

function.zh: 安全。
function.en: Security.

taxationSystem.zh: 增值税、所得税和社保为主。
taxationSystem.en: VAT, income tax, and social contributions.

culturalAchievements.zh: 文艺复兴发源地、时尚之都米兰、美食文化、歌剧传统。
culturalAchievements.en: Renaissance birthplace; Milan fashion; cuisine; opera.

languageFamily.zh: 印欧语系罗曼语族（意大利语）

philosophy.zh: 文艺复兴人文主义传统。
philosophy.en: Renaissance humanist tradition.

gdpDescription.zh: 世界第六大经济体，制造业强国。
gdpDescription.en: World's 6th largest economy; manufacturing power.

mainIndustries.zh: 汽车、时尚、食品、机械、旅游

tradeGoods.zh: 机械、纺织品、汽车、食品、葡萄酒

householdWealth.zh: 北部富裕、南部相对贫困。
householdWealth.en: North affluent; south relatively poor.

economicSystem.zh: 混合市场经济。
economicSystem.en: Mixed market economy.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 欧盟趋同框架下的紧缩。
fiscalPolicy.en: Austerity under EU convergence.

description.zh: 北约南翼重要力量。
description.en: Major NATO southern flank force.

description.zh: 地中海力量。
description.en: Mediterranean force.

description.zh: 欧洲标准装备。
description.en: European-standard equipment.

technology.zh: 北约标准装备。

keyInnovations.zh: 时尚设计、机械工程、食品加工。
keyInnovations.en: Fashion design, mechanical engineering, food processing.

infrastructure.zh: 北部一流、南部有待改善。

allies.zh: 北约、欧盟（创始成员）

foreignPolicy.zh: 欧洲一体化和地中海合作。
foreignPolicy.en: European integration and Mediterranean cooperation.

strengths.zh: 制造业实力、文化影响、旅游、设计。
strengths.en: Manufacturing strength, cultural influence, tourism, design.

weaknesses.zh: 南北差距、高公债、政治不稳定、有组织犯罪。
weaknesses.en: North-south gap, high debt, political instability, organized crime.

outlook.zh: 经济体量大但结构改革滞后。
outlook.en: Large economy but structural reform lagging.

description.zh: 2000年的意大利是世界第六大经济体和欧盟创始国。
description.en: Italy in 2000: world's 6th economy and EU founding member.

name.zh: 橄榄树联盟/左翼民主党
name.en: Olive Tree / Democrats of the Left

ideology.zh: 中左社会民主主义、欧洲一体化、进步改革
ideology.en: Center-left social democracy, European integration, progressive reform

relationship.zh: 橄榄树联盟是1990年代意大利中左翼力量的集合，在旧共产党转型为左翼民主党后整合了社会民主与进步派力量。阿马托作为温和派技术官僚总理，致力于推进欧元区整合与财政纪律。联盟在面对右翼贝卢斯科尼集团时试图保持团结。
relationship.en: The Olive Tree coalition assembled Italy's center-left forces after the former Communists transformed into the Democrats of the Left. PM Amato, a moderate technocratic figure, focused on Eurozone integration and fiscal discipline. The coalition sought to maintain unity against Berlusconi's right-wing bloc.

description.zh: 橄榄树联盟诞生于1990年代意大利政治大洗牌'清廉之手'运动之后，左翼民主党从意大利共产党转型而来，拥抱社会民主路线。1996年普罗迪领导联盟赢得大选，此后经历达莱马和阿马托两位总理。联盟推动了意大利加入欧元区的经济准备工作，实施紧缩政策以满足马斯特里赫特标准。然而内部派系纷争不断，从前共产党人到天主教中间派再到绿党，意识形态差异明显，凝聚力始终面临考验。
description.en: The Olive Tree coalition emerged from the upheaval of Italy's 'Clean Hands' anti-corruption movement in the 1990s. The Democrats of the Left had evolved from the Italian Communist Party, embracing social democracy. After Prodi led the coalition to victory in 1996, it went through PMs D'Alema and Amato. The coalition drove Italy's economic preparations for Eurozone entry, implementing austerity to meet the Maastricht criteria. However, internal factionalism was persistent—ranging from ex-Communists to Catholic centrists to Greens—and ideological cohesion remained a constant challenge.

role.zh: 温和派技术官僚总理，推进欧元区整合
role.en: Moderate technocratic PM advancing Eurozone integration

role.zh: 左翼民主党核心领袖，首位前共产党人出身的意大利总理
role.en: Core leader of the Democrats of the Left; first former Communist to serve as Italian PM

title.zh: 前总理、欧盟委员会主席

role.zh: 橄榄树联盟创立者，2000年时任欧盟委员会主席
role.en: Founder of the Olive Tree coalition; serving as European Commission President in 2000

ideology.zh: 民粹保守主义、自由市场经济、反共产主义、个人魅力政治
ideology.en: Populist conservatism, free-market economics, anti-communism, personality-driven politics

relationship.zh: 力量党是贝卢斯科尼围绕个人媒体帝国和反左翼立场建立的中右翼主导政党，在自由之家联盟中联合了国家联盟和北方联盟。作为反对党领袖，贝卢斯科尼正积极准备2001年大选的卷土重来。与北方联盟的联盟关系时而紧张，但在反左翼目标上保持一致。
relationship.en: Forza Italia was the center-right party Berlusconi built around his media empire and anti-left stance, leading the House of Freedoms alliance with the National Alliance and Lega Nord. As opposition leader, Berlusconi was actively preparing for a 2001 comeback. His alliance with Lega Nord was sometimes tense but united in opposing the left.

description.zh: 意大利力量党由媒体大亨贝卢斯科尼于1994年在第一共和国崩溃后创立，是一种全新的个人化政党模式。贝卢斯科尼利用其菲宁韦斯特集团控制的三大电视网络，将商业营销手法引入政治。该党没有传统的意识形态根基，而是以反共产主义、减税、经济自由化和个人魅力为号召。1994年短暂执政后下台，此后一直作为反对派核心力量运作，联合右翼各方势力组建'自由之家'联盟。贝卢斯科尼虽面临多项司法调查，但其媒体影响力和政治动员能力使其始终是意大利政坛最具影响力的人物之一。
description.en: Forza Italia was created by media tycoon Berlusconi in 1994 after the collapse of the First Republic, representing an entirely new model of personality-based politics. Berlusconi leveraged his Fininvest group's three major TV networks to bring commercial marketing techniques into politics. The party lacked traditional ideological roots, instead rallying around anti-communism, tax cuts, economic liberalization, and personal charisma. After a brief stint in government in 1994, it operated as the core opposition force, uniting right-wing factions into the House of Freedoms alliance. Despite multiple judicial investigations, Berlusconi's media influence and political mobilization capacity made him one of the most powerful figures in Italian politics.

role.zh: 媒体帝国缔造者与中右翼联盟领袖，准备2001年重新执政
role.en: Media empire builder and center-right alliance leader, preparing for 2001 return to power

role.zh: 右翼联盟关键盟友，推动原新法西斯政党向民主右翼转型
role.en: Key right-wing ally pushing the former neo-fascist party toward democratic conservatism

role.zh: 贝卢斯科尼亲信与力量党组织核心人物
role.en: Berlusconi confidant and key organizational figure in Forza Italia

ideology.zh: 北方分离主义/联邦主义、反移民、反南方、地方主义

relationship.zh: 北方联盟是意大利政坛独特的地方主义政党，在1990年代与力量党结盟又破裂后，2000年重新成为贝卢斯科尼自由之家联盟的一员。博西在合作中保持高度独立性，经常以退出联盟相威胁来争取北方利益。该党与主流政党的关系高度功利化。
relationship.en: Lega Nord was a unique regionalist force in Italian politics. After allying with and splitting from Forza Italia in the 1990s, it rejoined Berlusconi's House of Freedoms coalition by 2000. Bossi maintained high independence within the alliance, frequently threatening withdrawal to advance northern interests. Its relationships with mainstream parties were highly transactional.

description.zh: 北方联盟于1991年由博西将多个北方地方联盟整合而成，其核心诉求是意大利北方经济发达地区不应继续为南方'拖后腿'买单。该党主张将意大利改造为联邦制甚至推动北方独立建立'帕达尼亚'共和国。在文化上强调北方的凯尔特-日耳曼身份认同，与南方地中海文化对立。同时反对大规模移民，尤其是来自非洲和东欧的移民。1990年代中期博西曾'宣布'帕达尼亚独立引发全国争议。虽然独立主张从未获主流支持，但联邦制改革和反移民立场为其赢得了北方工薪阶层和中小企业主的稳固票仓。
description.en: Lega Nord was formed in 1991 when Bossi merged several northern regional leagues, built on the core grievance that Italy's economically advanced North should not subsidize the 'backward' South. The party advocated transforming Italy into a federation or even pushing for northern independence as a 'Padania' republic. Culturally, it emphasized a Celtic-Germanic northern identity in opposition to southern Mediterranean culture. It also opposed large-scale immigration, especially from Africa and Eastern Europe. In the mid-1990s, Bossi controversially 'declared' Padanian independence. Though the independence agenda never gained mainstream support, federalist reform and anti-immigration stances secured a solid base among northern working-class voters and small business owners.

role.zh: 北方联盟创始人与灵魂人物，推动联邦制与北方自治
role.en: Founder and spiritual leader of the Lega, driving federalism and northern autonomy

role.zh: 党内二号人物，温和派代表，负责联盟管理
role.en: Second-in-command, moderate voice, responsible for alliance management

role.zh: 党务组织核心人物，推动联邦制宪法改革议程
role.en: Core party organizer, advancing the federalist constitutional reform agenda

governmentForm.zh: 1999年政变后军政府执政。
governmentForm.en: Military junta after 1999 coup.

socialStructure.zh: 多民族，北部穆斯林和南部基督徒分裂。
socialStructure.en: Multi-ethnic; north Muslim/south Christian divide.

rulingClass.zh: 军方领导人。
rulingClass.en: Military leaders.

succession.zh: 政变夺权。
succession.en: Seized through coup.

structure.zh: 军政府过渡。
structure.en: Military junta transition.

function.zh: 军事。
function.en: Military.

taxationSystem.zh: 可可出口税和关税。
taxationSystem.en: Cocoa export tax and customs.

religion.zh: 伊斯兰教/基督教/传统信仰

culturalAchievements.zh: 全球最大可可生产国，面具艺术传统。
culturalAchievements.en: World's largest cocoa producer; mask art tradition.

languageFamily.zh: 尼日尔-刚果语系；法语

philosophy.zh: 多元宗教和文化。
philosophy.en: Diverse religions and cultures.

gdpDescription.zh: 政变冲击经济，但仍为西非最大经济体之一。
gdpDescription.en: Coup-hit but still one of West Africa's largest economies.

mainIndustries.zh: 可可、咖啡、棕榈油、石油

householdWealth.zh: 贫富差距大。
householdWealth.en: Large wealth gap.

description.zh: 挪威工党是挪威最大的政党。2000年3月斯托尔滕贝格接任首相，组建少数派政府。在石油收入的支撑下，工党政府致力于维护和完善挪威的福利国家体系。斯托尔滕贝格后来成为北约秘书长。
description.en: The Norwegian Labour Party is Norway's largest party. In March 2000, Stoltenberg became Prime Minister, forming a minority government. Supported by petroleum revenues, the Labour government focused on maintaining Norway's comprehensive welfare state. Stoltenberg would later become NATO Secretary General.

ideology.zh: 自由保守主义

relationship.zh: 主要反对党，主张自由市场经济改革。

description.zh: 挪威保守党是挪威主要的中右翼政党，主张降低税收、减少政府干预、推进私有化以及加强个人自由。在商业界和城市中上层选民中拥有传统支持基础。
description.en: The Conservative Party is Norway's main centre-right party, advocating lower taxes, reduced government intervention, privatization, and individual freedoms. It maintained traditional support among the business community and urban upper-middle-class voters.

ideology.zh: 右翼民粹主义、古典自由主义

relationship.zh: 反对党，影响力不断增长，在移民和税收问题上挑战主流政党。

description.zh: 挪威进步党是一个右翼民粹主义政党，主张大幅减税、利用石油基金直接惠及民众和严格管控移民。到2000年已成为挪威议会中的重要力量，其崛起反映了北欧右翼民粹主义运动的普遍趋势。
description.en: The Progress Party is a right-wing populist party advocating significant tax cuts, direct use of petroleum fund revenues, and stringent immigration restrictions. By 2000, it had become a significant parliamentary force, reflecting the broader trend of right-wing populism across the Nordic countries.

relationship.zh: 执政党，以少数派政府形式执政。

description.zh: 葡萄牙社会党在安东尼奥·古特雷斯领导下自1995年起执政。葡萄牙于1999年成为欧元区创始成员国。古特雷斯后于2017年出任联合国秘书长。
description.en: The Socialist Party governed under António Guterres since 1995. Portugal became a founding eurozone member in 1999. Guterres would later become UN Secretary-General in 2017.

leader.zh: 若泽·曼努埃尔·杜朗·巴罗佐

ideology.zh: 自由保守主义

relationship.zh: 主要反对党，在议会中批评政府的经济和财政政策。
relationship.en: Main opposition party, criticizing the government's economic and fiscal policies.

description.zh: 葡萄牙社会民主党尽管名称中含'社会民主'，实际上是葡萄牙主要的中右翼政党。巴罗佐的领导为PSD在2002年大选中的胜利奠定了基础，他后来于2004年出任欧盟委员会主席，任职十年。
description.en: The PSD, despite its name, is Portugal's main centre-right party. Barroso's leadership laid the groundwork for PSD's 2002 victory. He subsequently became President of the European Commission in 2004, serving for a decade.

ideology.zh: 共产主义、马克思列宁主义

relationship.zh: 反对党，对社会党政府的新自由主义经济政策持批评立场。
relationship.en: Opposition party, critical of the Socialist government's neoliberal economic policies.

description.zh: 葡萄牙共产党是西欧最传统的共产主义政党之一，在萨拉查独裁时期的长期地下斗争中积累了深厚的组织基础和道德权威。PCP通过其附属工会组织CGTP在劳工运动中发挥重要影响力。
description.en: The PCP is one of Western Europe's most orthodox communist parties, with deep organizational roots and moral authority from decades of underground resistance during the Salazar dictatorship. It wielded significant influence through its affiliated trade union, CGTP.

fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy.

description.zh: 军事力量。
description.en: Military forces.

technology.zh: 军事装备。

description.zh: 2000年的新加坡是亚洲四小龙之一。
description.en: Singapore in 2000: one of the Asian Tigers.

ideology.zh: 务实威权主义、精英治国、经济发展优先、多元种族和谐、亚洲价值观
ideology.en: Pragmatic authoritarianism, meritocracy, economic development priority, multiracial harmony, Asian values

relationship.zh: 人民行动党自1959年起不间断执政，在2000年前后控制议会几乎所有席位。吴作栋作为第二任总理自1990年接班李光耀以来，以较温和的风格推行经济改革与社会开放，但PAP一党优势体制的本质未变。该党通过高效治理、公共住房制度和经济成就维系执政合法性。
relationship.en: The PAP had governed without interruption since 1959 and controlled nearly all parliamentary seats around 2000. Goh Chok Tong, the second PM since succeeding Lee Kuan Yew in 1990, pursued economic reform and social opening in a gentler style, though the fundamental nature of PAP one-party dominance remained unchanged. The party sustained its ruling legitimacy through efficient governance, the public housing system, and economic achievement.

description.zh: 人民行动党由李光耀等人于1954年创立，是新加坡独立以来唯一的执政党。该党以务实主义、精英治国和经济发展为核心理念，将新加坡从第三世界发展中国家转变为全球金融与贸易中心。2000年吴作栋已执政十年，正为李显龙接班铺路。PAP通过选区重划、媒体管控、集选区制度和严格的诽谤法等手段维持政治优势，但同时以高效率的公共行政、廉洁政府和世界一流的基础设施赢得多数民众支持。亚洲金融危机后新加坡经济快速复苏，进一步巩固了PAP的执政地位。
description.en: The PAP was founded by Lee Kuan Yew and others in 1954 and has been Singapore's sole ruling party since independence. With pragmatism, meritocracy, and economic development as core principles, it transformed Singapore from a developing state into a global financial and trade hub. By 2000 Goh Chok Tong had governed for a decade and was preparing the ground for Lee Hsien Loong's succession. The PAP maintained political dominance through constituency redrawing, media regulation, the Group Representation Constituency system, and strict defamation laws, while simultaneously earning majority public support through efficient public administration, clean government, and world-class infrastructure. Rapid post-Asian-financial-crisis recovery further cemented PAP's governing position.

role.zh: 国家最高行政长官，推动经济改革与渐进式社会开放
role.en: Head of government, advancing economic reform and gradual social opening

title.en: Deputy Prime Minister and Minister for Trade and Industry

role.zh: 被广泛视为下一任总理人选，主导经济政策
role.en: Widely seen as the next PM, leading economic policy

role.zh: 资深内阁成员，负责国防与安全事务
role.en: Senior cabinet member responsible for defense and security affairs

ideology.zh: 温和社会民主主义、议会反对派、政治多元化、社会公平
ideology.en: Moderate social democracy, parliamentary opposition, political pluralism, social equity

relationship.zh: 工人党是新加坡最具组织性和持续性的反对党，在PAP主导的政治环境中艰难生存。刘程强自1991年当选国会议员后成为反对派标志性人物，以务实、温和的方式在后港选区维持阵地。工人党主张更大的政治多元化和社会公平，但在PAP控制的媒体和制度环境中影响力有限。
relationship.en: The Workers' Party was Singapore's most organized and enduring opposition party, surviving in the PAP-dominated political landscape. Low Thia Khiang became a symbolic opposition figure after winning his parliamentary seat in 1991, maintaining a pragmatic and moderate presence in Hougang constituency. The WP advocated greater political pluralism and social equity but had limited influence under PAP-controlled media and institutional conditions.

description.zh: 工人党成立于1957年，是新加坡历史最悠久的反对党之一。在经历了多年被边缘化后，工人党在1991年由刘程强赢得后港单选区议席，实现突破。到2000年，工人党在国会中仅有刘程强一名民选议员，加上少量非选区议员。刘程强以潮州方言服务基层著称，采取务实而非对抗的反对策略，逐步积累选民信任。工人党主张建立更健全的制衡机制、提高社会福利标准和增强政策透明度，但在PAP压倒性优势下只能扮演有限的监督角色。
description.en: The Workers' Party was founded in 1957 and was one of Singapore's longest-standing opposition parties. After years of marginalization, the WP achieved a breakthrough when Low Thia Khiang won the Hougang single-member constituency in 1991. By 2000 the WP held only Low's elected seat plus a few Non-Constituency MP positions. Low was known for serving constituents in Teochew dialect and adopted a pragmatic rather than confrontational opposition strategy, gradually building voter trust. The WP advocated stronger checks and balances, higher social welfare standards, and greater policy transparency, but could only play a limited oversight role under PAP's overwhelming dominance.

role.zh: 反对派领袖，后港选区民选议员
role.en: Opposition leader and elected MP for Hougang

role.zh: 新加坡反对派先驱，虽已离开工人党但影响深远
role.en: Pioneer of Singapore's opposition movement whose influence endured after leaving the WP

role.zh: 协助刘程强管理党务，培养新一代反对派力量
role.en: Assisted Low in managing party affairs and cultivating a new generation of opposition figures

ideology.zh: 新加坡模式、威权发展主义、法治、反福利主义、务实外交
ideology.en: Singapore model, authoritarian developmentalism, rule of law, anti-welfarism, pragmatic diplomacy

relationship.zh: 李光耀虽于1990年卸任总理，但以内阁资政身份继续在政府决策中发挥核心影响力。他在外交、安全和战略规划方面的意见仍具有决定性分量，被视为新加坡国家方向的最终定调者。吴作栋政府的重大政策基本不会背离李光耀的核心理念。
relationship.en: Though Lee Kuan Yew stepped down as PM in 1990, he continued to wield core influence over government decision-making as Senior Minister. His views on diplomacy, security, and strategic planning carried decisive weight, and he was regarded as the ultimate arbiter of Singapore's national direction. Major policies under the Goh government fundamentally did not deviate from Lee's core philosophy.

description.zh: 李光耀是新加坡建国之父，1959至1990年担任总理长达31年，缔造了'新加坡模式'——将威权治理、经济自由化、严格法治和多元种族管理结合为一体。卸任后他先后担任内阁资政和内阁资政（荣誉），继续出席内阁会议并对关键议题发表意见。到2000年，76岁的李光耀仍是新加坡政坛最具影响力的人物，他对中美关系、东盟区域安全和新加坡发展战略的判断被国内外广泛关注。他的政治遗产深刻塑造了PAP的治国理念，也为其子李显龙的接班铺平了道路。
description.en: Lee Kuan Yew was Singapore's founding father, serving as PM for 31 years from 1959 to 1990 and creating the 'Singapore model' — a synthesis of authoritarian governance, economic liberalization, strict rule of law, and multiracial management. After stepping down he served as Senior Minister and later Minister Mentor, continuing to attend cabinet meetings and weigh in on key issues. By 2000, the 76-year-old Lee remained Singapore's most influential political figure, with his judgments on US-China relations, ASEAN regional security, and Singapore's development strategy commanding attention domestically and internationally. His political legacy profoundly shaped PAP's governing philosophy and also paved the way for his son Lee Hsien Loong's succession.

role.zh: 建国之父，继续主导国家战略方向
role.en: Founding father who continued to shape national strategic direction

description.zh: 2000年的西班牙经济高速增长。
description.en: Spain in 2000: rapid economic growth.

ideology.zh: 保守主义、基督教民主主义

relationship.zh: 执政党，在2000年大选中赢得绝对多数。
relationship.en: Ruling party, won an absolute majority in the 2000 general election.

description.zh: 西班牙人民党在阿斯纳尔领导下于2000年3月大选中赢得议会绝对多数。阿斯纳尔政府推行经济自由化改革、私有化国有企业，使西班牙经济保持强劲增长并达到加入欧元区的标准。人民党持坚定的西班牙统一主义立场，反对巴斯克和加泰罗尼亚的分离主义运动。
description.en: The PP under Aznar won an absolute majority in March 2000. Aznar's government pursued economic liberalization, privatization, and labor market flexibility, maintaining strong growth and eurozone qualification. The PP held firm Spanish unionist positions, opposing Basque and Catalan separatism.

leader.zh: 何塞·路易斯·罗德里格斯·萨帕特罗

ideology.zh: 社会民主主义

relationship.zh: 主要反对党，2000年大选惨败后进入内部重组期。
relationship.en: Main opposition party, undergoing reorganization after a heavy defeat in the 2000 election.

description.zh: 西班牙工人社会党是西班牙历史最悠久的政党。2000年大选惨败后，年轻的萨帕特罗当选总书记，开启党的更新进程。他将在2004年大选中带领社工党重返执政。
description.en: PSOE is Spain's oldest party. After the 2000 defeat, the young Zapatero was elected General Secretary, initiating party renewal. He would lead PSOE back to power in the 2004 election.

leaderTitle.zh: 加泰罗尼亚自治区主席

ideology.zh: 加泰罗尼亚民族主义、基督教民主主义

relationship.zh: 加泰罗尼亚执政联盟，此前曾支持人民党少数派政府，2000年人民党赢得绝对多数后失去杠杆地位。
relationship.en: Ruling coalition in Catalonia; previously supported the PP minority government, lost kingmaker role after the PP won an absolute majority in 2000.

description.zh: 融合与联盟是加泰罗尼亚地区最重要的民族主义政党联盟。普约尔自1980年起连续担任加泰罗尼亚自治区主席。CiU主张温和的加泰罗尼亚民族主义，寻求在西班牙国家框架内扩大自治权。1996-2000年间为阿斯纳尔少数派政府提供关键支持，但2000年人民党赢得绝对多数后失去了议会关键少数的杠杆地位。
description.en: CiU was Catalonia's most important nationalist coalition. Pujol served continuously as President of Catalonia since 1980. CiU advocated moderate Catalan nationalism, seeking expanded autonomy within Spain. During 1996-2000, CiU provided crucial parliamentary support for Aznar's minority government but lost its pivotal kingmaker role after the PP won an absolute majority in 2000.

description.zh: 2000年的瑞典是创新驱动的北欧福利国家。
description.en: Sweden in 2000: innovation-driven Nordic welfare state.

ideology.zh: 社会民主主义、瑞典模式福利国家、劳工权益、渐进式改良主义
ideology.en: Social democracy, Swedish model welfare state, labor rights, gradualist reformism

relationship.zh: 作为执政党，社民党主导瑞典政策方向，与左翼党形成议会合作关系，维持福利国家核心架构。该党在1995年推动瑞典加入欧盟，巩固了其作为战后瑞典政治主导力量的地位。
relationship.en: As the ruling party, the Social Democrats set Sweden's policy direction, forming a parliamentary cooperation arrangement with the Left Party to maintain the welfare state's core architecture. The party led Sweden into EU membership in 1995, consolidating its position as the dominant force in postwar Swedish politics.

description.zh: 瑞典社会民主工人党是欧洲历史最悠久、最成功的社会民主主义政党之一，自1932年以来几乎持续执政。在佩尔松领导下，该党在2000年前后推行务实的中间偏左经济政策，平衡财政紧缩与福利国家维护。该党致力于充分就业、普遍社会保障和渐进式国际化，同时面临全球化和移民带来的新挑战。瑞典模式——高税收、高福利、强劳动保护——仍是该党政治认同的核心。
description.en: The Swedish Social Democratic Party is one of Europe's oldest and most successful social democratic parties, governing almost continuously since 1932. Under Persson's leadership around 2000, the party pursued pragmatic center-left economic policies balancing fiscal discipline with welfare-state preservation. It was committed to full employment, universal social insurance, and gradual internationalization, while facing new challenges from globalization and immigration. The Swedish model—high taxes, generous welfare, strong labor protections—remained the core of the party's political identity.

role.zh: 执政党领袖，主导瑞典内政与欧盟事务
role.en: Party leader heading domestic policy and EU engagement

ideology.zh: 自由保守主义、中间偏右、减税、放松管制、市场自由化
ideology.en: Liberal conservatism, center-right, tax cuts, deregulation, market liberalization

relationship.zh: 温和联合党是社民党的主要反对力量，领导中间偏右联盟挑战执政党的福利国家模式。该党主张更大规模的减税和私有化改革，在议会中扮演制衡角色。
relationship.en: The Moderate Party was the primary opposition force to the Social Democrats, leading a center-right alliance challenging the ruling party's welfare-state model. It advocated larger tax cuts and privatization, serving as a counterbalance in parliament.

description.zh: 温和联合党是瑞典最大的中间偏右政党，主张自由市场经济、降低税负和公共部门改革。在伦德格伦领导下，该党2000年前后倡导减少国家干预、鼓励企业创新和个人选择自由。尽管该党尚未重返执政地位，但其政策纲领对瑞典政治光谱产生了深远影响，为日后莱因费尔特领导下2006年赢得大选奠定了基础。该党传统上代表城市中产阶级与工商业界利益。
description.en: The Moderate Party was Sweden's largest center-right party, advocating free-market economics, lower taxes, and public-sector reform. Under Lundgren around 2000, the party championed reduced state intervention, entrepreneurial innovation, and individual freedom of choice. Though not yet back in power, its policy platform exerted significant influence on the Swedish political spectrum, laying groundwork for the party's 2006 electoral victory under Reinfeldt. It traditionally represented urban middle-class and business interests.

role.zh: 反对党领袖，推动中间偏右政策议程
role.en: Opposition leader driving the center-right policy agenda

ideology.zh: 民主社会主义、女权主义、生态社会主义、反资本主义

relationship.zh: 左翼党作为社民党的议会支持力量，为少数派政府提供关键投票支持。虽不直接入阁，但通过预算谈判和政策协商对政府施加影响，推动更激进的福利和平等政策。
relationship.en: The Left Party served as a parliamentary support partner for the Social Democrats, providing crucial votes for the minority government. Though not in cabinet, it exerted influence through budget negotiations and policy consultations, pushing for more radical welfare and equality measures.

description.zh: 左翼党前身为瑞典共产党，1990年更名并转型为民主社会主义政党。在希曼领导下，该党以女权主义和社会平等为旗帜，吸引了大量关注性别平等和环境正义的选民。该党在2000年前后为社民党少数政府提供关键议会支持，在福利、教育和劳动政策上发挥了超越其议席规模的影响力。该党反对瑞典加入欧元区，坚持反战和国际主义立场。
description.en: The Left Party, formerly the Swedish Communist Party, was renamed and transformed into a democratic socialist party in 1990. Under Schyman, the party championed feminism and social equality, attracting voters concerned with gender equality and environmental justice. Around 2000 it provided crucial parliamentary support for the Social Democratic minority government, wielding influence on welfare, education, and labor policy beyond its seat count. The party opposed Sweden's adoption of the euro and maintained anti-war and internationalist positions.

role.zh: 左翼党领袖，女权主义政治代表人物
role.en: Left Party leader and prominent feminist political figure

description.zh: 2000年的土耳其面临经济危机。
description.en: Turkey in 2000: facing economic crisis.

ideology.zh: 民主左翼、世俗主义、凯末尔主义、社会民主
ideology.en: Democratic left, secularism, Kemalism, social democracy

relationship.zh: 埃杰维特领导的民主左翼党自1999年大选后与民族行动党和祖国党组成三党联合政府，在抓获库尔德工人党领导人厄贾兰后获得民意支持。联合政府推动IMF框架下的经济改革，但面临严峻的通货膨胀和银行危机考验。
relationship.en: Ecevit's DSP formed a three-party coalition with the Nationalist Movement Party and Motherland Party after the 1999 elections, buoyed by the capture of PKK leader Öcalan. The coalition pursued IMF-backed economic reform but faced severe inflation and banking crisis challenges.

description.zh: 民主左翼党由比伦特·埃杰维特于1985年创立，定位为凯末尔主义左翼政党，强调世俗共和国原则、社会公正和国家主权。1999年埃杰维特因成功推动抓获库尔德工人党领袖阿卜杜拉·厄贾兰而声望大涨，赢得大选成为最大党。该党在2000年面临严峻考验，土耳其经历了严重的经济危机，银行体系濒临崩溃，通胀居高不下，IMF救援方案成为政治焦点。库尔德问题仍是国内最敏感议题之一。
description.en: The Democratic Left Party was founded by Bülent Ecevit in 1985 as a Kemalist left-wing party emphasizing secular republican principles, social justice, and national sovereignty. Ecevit's popularity surged after orchestrating the 1999 capture of PKK leader Abdullah Öcalan, leading the DSP to become the largest party in the general election. By 2000 the party faced severe tests as Turkey endured a major economic crisis with a banking system on the brink of collapse, persistently high inflation, and an IMF rescue package becoming the political focal point. The Kurdish question remained one of the most sensitive domestic issues.

role.zh: 联合政府领袖，主导经济改革与安全政策
role.en: Coalition leader directing economic reform and security policy

role.zh: 推进土耳其-希腊关系缓和与欧盟候选国进程
role.en: Advanced Turkish-Greek rapprochement and EU candidacy process

role.zh: 埃杰维特亲信，协调联合政府内部事务
role.en: Ecevit's confidant, coordinating coalition internal affairs

ideology.zh: 政治伊斯兰、保守民主、社会福利、反世俗主义极端化
ideology.en: Political Islam, conservative democracy, social welfare, opposition to extreme secularism

relationship.zh: 美德党作为被取缔的繁荣党的继承者，在议会中构成主要反对力量，名义领袖库坦实际受到被禁止参政的内吉梅丁·埃尔巴坎的幕后影响。该党内部改革派与传统派之间的路线斗争日趋激烈，预示着日后正义与发展党的诞生。
relationship.en: As successor to the banned Welfare Party, the Virtue Party formed the main parliamentary opposition, with nominal leader Kutan influenced behind the scenes by the banned Necmettin Erbakan. An intensifying internal struggle between reformists and traditionalists foreshadowed the eventual birth of the AKP.

description.zh: 美德党于1997年在繁荣党被宪法法院取缔后成立，继承了土耳其政治伊斯兰运动的传统。该党表面上由雷杰·库坦领导，但实际决策仍深受前总理埃尔巴坎的影响。2000年前后，党内以雷杰普·塔伊普·埃尔多安和阿卜杜拉·居尔为代表的改革派主张放弃传统伊斯兰主义路线、拥抱民主与市场经济，与保守派产生严重分歧。美德党本身也面临宪法法院取缔的威胁，最终于2001年被解散，改革派随即创建了正义与发展党。
description.en: The Virtue Party was founded in 1997 after the Constitutional Court banned the Welfare Party, inheriting Turkey's political Islamist movement. Though nominally led by Recai Kutan, decision-making remained heavily influenced by former PM Erbakan. Around 2000, reformists led by Recep Tayyip Erdoğan and Abdullah Gül advocated abandoning traditional Islamism in favor of democratic engagement and market economics, creating a deep rift with conservatives. The Virtue Party itself faced closure proceedings and was ultimately dissolved in 2001, with reformists immediately founding the Justice and Development Party (AKP).

role.zh: 名义领袖，维持埃尔巴坎路线的过渡人物
role.en: Nominal leader serving as transitional figure for the Erbakan line

name.zh: 雷杰普·塔伊普·埃尔多安

title.zh: 前伊斯坦布尔市长、改革派领袖

role.zh: 党内改革派核心人物，因政治案被禁止参政但影响力巨大
role.en: Core reformist figure banned from politics but wielding enormous influence

role.zh: 与埃尔多安共同推动伊斯兰民主化转型路线
role.en: Worked with Erdoğan to advance an Islamic democratic transformation agenda

leader.zh: 土耳其武装力量总参谋部

ideology.zh: 凯末尔主义世俗守护、国家统一、反政治伊斯兰、反分裂主义
ideology.en: Kemalist secular guardianship, national unity, anti-political Islam, anti-separatism

relationship.zh: 军方在土耳其政治中扮演世俗共和国的守护者角色，1997年'后现代政变'迫使伊斯兰主义政府下台的遗产仍深刻影响着2000年的政治格局。军方通过国家安全委员会对政府施加影响，支持世俗主义联合政府，同时在库尔德冲突中保持主导作用。
relationship.en: The military served as self-appointed guardian of the secular republic, with the legacy of the 1997 'postmodern coup' that forced the Islamist government from power still deeply shaping politics in 2000. The military exerted influence through the National Security Council, supported the secularist coalition government, and maintained a dominant role in the Kurdish conflict.

description.zh: 土耳其武装力量自共和国建立以来始终是凯末尔主义世俗秩序的核心支柱，曾多次干预政治以维护世俗原则。1997年军方通过施压手段迫使由内吉梅丁·埃尔巴坎领导的伊斯兰主义联合政府辞职，被称为'后现代政变'。到2000年，军方仍通过国家安全委员会这一制度化渠道对政府决策施加重大影响，尤其在安全政策、库尔德问题和政教关系领域。军方视美德党为潜在威胁，支持世俗主义政党联盟执政，同时在东南部持续进行反库尔德武装行动。
description.en: The Turkish Armed Forces had been a core pillar of the Kemalist secular order since the republic's founding, intervening multiple times to uphold secular principles. In 1997 the military pressured the Islamist coalition government led by Necmettin Erbakan to resign in what was called the 'postmodern coup.' By 2000 the military still wielded significant influence over government decisions through the institutionalized National Security Council, especially regarding security policy, the Kurdish question, and religion-state relations. The military viewed the Virtue Party as a potential threat, supported the secularist party coalition in power, and continued counter-insurgency operations in the southeast.

role.zh: 武装力量最高指挥官，国家安全委员会关键成员
role.en: Supreme commander of the armed forces and key member of the National Security Council

role.zh: 陆军最高将领，参与反恐与东南部军事行动决策

role.zh: 对涉嫌反世俗活动进行调查与起诉
role.en: Investigated and prosecuted suspected anti-secular activities

description.zh: 全球投入数千亿美元修复计算机系统的“千年虫”问题后，2000年1月1日零时平安度过，未发生大规模系统崩溃。这一事件反映了人类社会对信息技术基础设施的深度依赖。
description.en: After spending hundreds of billions globally to fix the 'Y2K bug' in computer systems, the world safely passed midnight on January 1, 2000 without major system failures. The event highlighted humanity's deep dependence on IT infrastructure.

description.zh: 纳斯达克指数在三月达到历史最高点后急剧暴跌，大量互联网公司破产倒闭。这场泡沫的破裂标志着互联网经济第一阶段的终结，全球科技产业陷入深度调整。
description.en: The NASDAQ index plummeted sharply after reaching its all-time high in March, with numerous internet companies going bankrupt. The burst of the dot-com bubble marked the end of the first phase of the internet economy, plunging the global tech industry into deep restructuring.

description.zh: 基地组织劫持四架民航客机对美国发动恐怖袭击，撞击纽约世贸中心双塔和五角大楼，造成近三千人死亡。这一事件深刻改变了21世纪的全球安全格局和国际秩序。
description.en: Al-Qaeda operatives hijacked four commercial airliners and attacked the United States, striking the World Trade Center twin towers in New York and the Pentagon, killing nearly 3,000 people. The attacks fundamentally altered the global security landscape and international order of the 21st century.

description.zh: 九一一事件后，美国及北约盟国以打击基地组织和塔利班为由入侵阿富汗。塔利班政权迅速被推翻，但阿富汗战争将持续长达二十年，成为美国历史上最漫长的战争。
description.en: Following the 9/11 attacks, the US and NATO allies invaded Afghanistan to combat al-Qaeda and the Taliban. The Taliban regime was quickly toppled, but the Afghan war would last twenty years, becoming the longest war in American history.

title.zh: 中国加入世界贸易组织

description.zh: 经过十五年的艰苦谈判，中华人民共和国正式成为世界贸易组织成员。中国的加入极大地加速了全球化进程，使中国迅速崛起为“世界工厂”，深刻重塑了全球贸易格局。
description.en: After fifteen years of arduous negotiations, the People's Republic of China officially became a member of the World Trade Organization. China's accession greatly accelerated globalization, rapidly transforming China into the 'world's factory' and profoundly reshaping global trade patterns.

title.zh: 欧元纸币和硬币正式流通
title.en: Euro Banknotes and Coins Enter Circulation

description.zh: 欧元纸币和硬币在欧元区十二个国家正式开始流通，取代了德国马克、法国法郎、意大利里拉等国家货币。这是欧洲一体化进程中最具象征意义的里程碑之一。
description.en: Euro banknotes and coins officially entered circulation in twelve eurozone countries, replacing national currencies including the German mark, French franc, and Italian lira. This was one of the most symbolically significant milestones in European integration.

description.zh: 美国以伊拉克拥有大规模杀伤性武器为由，绕过联合国安理会发动入侵。萨达姆政权在三周内被推翻，但伊拉克随即陷入长期的宗派冲突和游击战争，地区秩序严重动荡。
description.en: The United States invaded Iraq on the pretext of Iraqi possession of weapons of mass destruction, bypassing the UN Security Council. The Saddam regime was toppled within three weeks, but Iraq descended into prolonged sectarian conflict and insurgency.

description.zh: 严重急性呼吸综合征（SARS）从中国广东省迅速传播至全球近三十个国家和地区，造成数百人死亡。这场疫情暴露了全球公共卫生体系在应对新发传染病方面的重大缺陷。
description.en: Severe Acute Respiratory Syndrome (SARS) rapidly spread from Guangdong Province, China to nearly thirty countries, causing hundreds of deaths. The epidemic exposed critical weaknesses in the global public health system's response to emerging infectious diseases.

description.zh: 波兰、匈牙利、捷克等十个国家正式加入欧盟，这是欧盟历史上规模最大的一次扩大。东扩标志着冷战遗留的欧洲分裂正在走向终结，但也给欧盟内部治理带来新的挑战。
description.en: Poland, Hungary, the Czech Republic, and seven other countries formally joined the European Union in the largest single enlargement in EU history. The expansion signaled the end of Cold War-era European division but also brought new governance challenges.

description.zh: 印度尼西亚苏门答腊岛附近发生9.1级大地震，引发的海啸横扫印度洋沿岸十四个国家，造成超过23万人死亡。这是现代历史上最致命的自然灾害之一。
description.en: A magnitude 9.1 earthquake off the coast of Sumatra, Indonesia triggered a tsunami that devastated fourteen countries around the Indian Ocean, killing over 230,000 people. It was one of the deadliest natural disasters in modern history.

description.zh: 美国雷曼兄弟银行破产引发全球金融海啸，次贷危机从美国蔓延至全球，多国银行体系濒临崩溃。各国政府被迫投入数万亿美元救市，全球经济陷入自大萧条以来最严重的衰退。
description.en: The collapse of Lehman Brothers triggered a global financial tsunami as the subprime mortgage crisis spread from the US worldwide, pushing banking systems in multiple countries to the brink. Governments were forced to inject trillions in bailouts as the global economy entered its worst recession since the Great Depression.

description.zh: 俄罗斯与格鲁吉亚因南奥塞梯争端爆发五日战争。俄军迅速击败格军，承认南奥塞梯和阿布哈兹为独立国家。这场战争标志着俄罗斯重新成为挑战西方秩序的地缘政治大国。
description.en: Russia and Georgia fought a five-day war over the South Ossetia dispute. Russian forces quickly defeated the Georgian military and recognized South Ossetia and Abkhazia as independent states. The war signaled Russia's re-emergence as a geopolitical power challenging the Western order.

description.zh: 突尼斯小贩布瓦吉吉自焚引发的抗议浪潮迅速席卷整个阿拉伯世界，突尼斯、埃及、利比亚等国的威权政府相继被推翻。这场运动深刻改变了中东和北非的政治版图。
description.en: Protests triggered by the self-immolation of Tunisian vendor Bouazizi quickly swept across the Arab world, toppling authoritarian governments in Tunisia, Egypt, Libya, and beyond. The movement profoundly reshaped the political landscape of the Middle East and North Africa.

description.zh: 日本东北部发生9.0级大地震并引发巨大海啸，导致福岛第一核电站发生堆芯熔毁事故。这是自切尔诺贝利以来最严重的核事故，造成超过一万五千人死亡，数十万人被迫撤离。
description.en: A magnitude 9.0 earthquake and massive tsunami struck northeastern Japan, causing a core meltdown at the Fukushima Daiichi Nuclear Power Plant. It was the worst nuclear accident since Chernobyl, killing over 15,000 people and forcing hundreds of thousands to evacuate.

description.zh: 美国海豹突击队在巴基斯坦阿伯塔巴德突袭击毙基地组织领导人奥萨马·本·拉登。这一行动发生在九一一事件近十年后，标志着美国反恐战争的一个重要节点。
description.en: US Navy SEALs killed al-Qaeda leader Osama bin Laden in a raid in Abbottabad, Pakistan. The operation, nearly ten years after 9/11, marked a significant milestone in America's War on Terror.

description.zh: 在乌克兰亲欧盟革命之后，俄罗斯出兵占领并吞并了克里米亚半岛。这是冷战结束以来欧洲首次出现的领土兼并行为，引发了严重的国际危机和西方对俄制裁。
description.en: Following Ukraine's pro-EU revolution, Russia occupied and annexed the Crimean Peninsula. This was the first territorial annexation in Europe since the end of the Cold War, triggering a severe international crisis and Western sanctions against Russia.

description.zh: 极端组织ISIS在攻占伊拉克第二大城市摩苏尔后，宣布在伊拉克和叙利亚建立“哈里发国”。其控制区一度覆盖数百万人口的领土，成为21世纪最严重的恐怖主义威胁之一。
description.en: After capturing Mosul, Iraq's second-largest city, the extremist organization ISIS declared the establishment of a 'caliphate' spanning Iraq and Syria. At its peak, it controlled territory with millions of inhabitants, becoming one of the most severe terrorist threats of the 21st century.

description.zh: 195个国家在巴黎联合国气候变化大会上达成历史性协议，承诺将全球平均气温升幅控制在2摄氏度以内。这是全球应对气候变化的最重要里程碑，标志着国际社会首次就气候行动达成普遍共识。
description.en: 195 countries reached a historic agreement at the Paris UN Climate Change Conference, committing to keep global average temperature rise below 2 degrees Celsius. It was the most important milestone in global climate action, marking the first universal consensus on climate measures.

description.zh: 英国举行脱离欧盟的全民公投，结果以51.9%对48.1%通过脱欧。这一结果震动全球，标志着战后欧洲一体化进程遭遇最严重的挫折，并引发了关于全球化与民粹主义的深刻辩论。
description.en: The United Kingdom held a referendum on leaving the European Union, which passed 51.9% to 48.1% in favor of Brexit. The result shocked the world, marking the most serious setback to postwar European integration and sparking profound debates about globalization and populism.

description.zh: 新型冠状病毒肺炎（COVID-19）在中国武汉首次被报告，随后迅速蔓延至全球。这场百年一遇的大流行病造成数百万人死亡，深刻改变了全球经济格局、社会生活方式和国际关系。
description.en: COVID-19 was first reported in Wuhan, China, and rapidly spread worldwide. This once-in-a-century pandemic killed millions, profoundly transforming the global economic landscape, social lifestyles, and international relations.

title.zh: 卡特里娜飓风袭击美国

description.zh: 五级飓风卡特里娜登陆美国墨西哥湾沿岸，新奥尔良市堤坝溃决，城市大部分被淹没。灾难造成超过一千八百人死亡，暴露了美国在灾害应对和社会不平等方面的严重问题。
description.en: Category 5 Hurricane Katrina struck the US Gulf Coast, breaching New Orleans' levees and flooding most of the city. The disaster killed over 1,800 people, exposing serious problems in American disaster response and social inequality.

description.zh: 苏丹西部达尔富尔地区爆发大规模武装冲突，政府军和亲政府民兵对当地非阿拉伯族群发动种族清洗。这场冲突造成数十万人死亡、数百万人流离失所，被联合国称为世界上最严重的人道主义危机。
description.en: Large-scale armed conflict erupted in Sudan's western Darfur region, with government forces and pro-government militias launching ethnic cleansing against local non-Arab groups. The conflict killed hundreds of thousands and displaced millions, described by the UN as the world's worst humanitarian crisis.

title.zh: iPhone发布与移动互联网时代
title.en: iPhone Launch and the Mobile Internet Era

description.zh: 苹果公司发布第一代iPhone智能手机，开创了触摸屏智能手机时代。这一革命性产品彻底改变了人类的通信方式、信息消费模式和日常生活，催生了移动互联网生态系统。
description.en: Apple Inc. released the first-generation iPhone, ushering in the era of touchscreen smartphones. This revolutionary product fundamentally transformed human communication, information consumption, and daily life, giving birth to the mobile internet ecosystem.

description.zh: 第29届夏季奥林匹克运动会在北京隆重举行，中国以51枚金牌位居金牌榜首位。这届奥运会被视为中国崛起的标志性事件，向世界展示了中国的经济实力和组织能力。
description.en: The 29th Summer Olympic Games were held in Beijing, with China topping the gold medal tally with 51 golds. The Olympics were seen as a landmark event symbolizing China's rise, showcasing the nation's economic strength and organizational capabilities to the world.

description.zh: 南苏丹在经历长达数十年的内战后，通过全民公投正式从苏丹独立，成为世界上最年轻的国家。然而，新国家很快陷入部族冲突和内战，和平与发展之路任重道远。
description.en: After decades of civil war, South Sudan formally became independent from Sudan through a referendum, becoming the world's youngest country. However, the new nation soon descended into ethnic conflict and civil war, facing a long road to peace and development.
